verses.text: We shall unite the believers with those descendants of theirs who followed them in their faith, and shall not deny them any part of the reward for their good deeds. 1 Every person is pledged to what he did. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: We shall provide them in abundance with all kinds of fruit and meat, 1 whatever they may desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
verses.text: They shall pass on to one another a cup that will incite neither levity nor sin. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
verses.text: Youths as fair as hidden pearls will be set apart to wait upon them; they will be running to and fro to serve them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: They will turn to one another and ask (regarding the past events).

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
verses.text: They will say: “When we were living before among our kinsfolk we lived in constant fear (of Allah's displeasure). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.text: Then Allah graced us with His favour and saved us from the chastisement of the scorching wind. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Formerly we had always prayed to Him. Surely He is Most Benign, Most Compassionate.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: So exhort (them, O Prophet), for by your Lord's Grace, you are neither a soothsayer nor a madman. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
verses.text: Or do they say: “He is a poet for whom we await an adverse turn of fortune.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.text: Tell them: “Wait; I too am waiting with you.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Do their minds prompt them to say such things, or are they a people immersed in transgression?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they say: “He has himself fabricated the Qur'an?” No; the truth is that they are altogether averse to believing. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: (If they are truthful in this), then let them produce a discourse of similar splendour. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Did they come into being without any creator? Or were they their own creators?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: Or is it they who created the heavens and the earth? No; the truth is that they lack sure faith. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have your Lord's treasures in their keeping? Or have absolute authority over them? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Or do they have a ladder whereon they can climb and attempt to listen (to what is transpiring in the Higher Realm)? Then, let any of them who has listened to it produce a clear proof of it.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: Or does Allah have daughters whereas you have sons? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or is it that you ask of them any recompense so that they should fear to be weighed down under the burden of debt? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or is it that they have access to (the Truths in) the realm beyond sense-perception which they are writing down? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
verses.text: Or are they contriving a stratagem against you? 1 If so, that stratagem will rebound against the unbelievers. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Do they have any god other than Allah? Exalted be Allah above whatever they associate (with Him in His Divinity). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
verses.text: (So obstinate are they that) even if they were to see some fragments of the sky falling down they would still say: “It is only a mass of cloud.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
verses.text: So leave them alone until they encounter that Day of theirs when they shall be struck down,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: when their stratagem shall be of no avail to them, nor shall they be succoured.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Surely a chastisement awaits the wrong-doers even before the coming of that Day; but most of them do not know. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: Be patient, then, (O Prophet), until the judgement of your Lord comes. 1 For surely you are before Our eyes. 2 And celebrate the praise of your Lord when you rise, 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: and also celebrate His praise at night, 1 and at the retreat of the stars. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.text: By the star when it sets: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.text: your companion 1 has neither strayed nor is he deluded; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ
verses.text: nor does he speak out of his desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْىٌ يُوحَىٰ
verses.text: This is nothing but a revelation that is conveyed to him, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ
verses.text: something that a very powerful one has imparted to him, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.text: one endowed with immense wisdom. 1 He came forth and stood poised,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: being on the higher horizon. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
verses.text: Then he drew near and hung above suspended,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
verses.text: until he was two bows' length away, or nearer. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ مَآ أَوْحَىٰ
verses.text: Then he revealed to Allah's servant whatever he had to reveal. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.text: His heart added no untruth to what he saw. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَتُمَـٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.text: Are you, then, going to contend with him regarding what he sees with his eyes?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: Indeed he saw him a second time,

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: by the lote-tree at the farthest boundary,

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ
verses.text: near which is the Garden of Abode. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.text: (This was) when the lote-tree was covered with that which covered it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.text: His eye did not waver, nor did it stray, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: and he certainly saw some of the greatest Signs of His Lord. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ
verses.text: Have you ever thought about al-Lat and al-Uzza, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: and about the third deity, al-Manat?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Shall you have the male issues, and He the female issues? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.text: That is indeed an unfair division!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَـٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: These are nothing but names that you and your forefathers have invented, for which Allah has sent down no authority. 1 They are merely following their conjectures and their carnal desires 2 although guidance has come to them from their Lord. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.text: Does man imagine that whatever he wishes for is right for him? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: To Allah belong both the Next World and the present.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: Numerous are the angels in the heavens; yet their intercession shall be of no avail, except in regard to those whom He grants the leave of intercession and whose plea He is pleased to accept. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Those who do not believe in the Hereafter give angels the names of females, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
verses.text: although they have no knowledge regarding that. They only follow their conjecture 1 and conjecture can never take the place of the Truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: So leave alone those who turn away from the remembrance of Us 1 and who seek nothing but the life of the world 2 –

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: that 1 being the utmost of their knowledge. 2 Surely your Lord fully knows those who have strayed away from His Path and He also fully knows those who are rightly guided.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَـٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
verses.text: To Allah alone belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth. 1 He will 2 requite the evil-doers for their deeds and bestow a goodly reward on those who have done good,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.text: on those who avoid grave sins 1 and shameful deeds, 2 even if they may sometimes stumble into lesser offences. 3 Surely your Lord is abounding in His Forgiveness. 4 Very well is He aware of you since He produced you from the earth, and while you were still in your mothers' wombs and not yet born. So do not boastfully claim yourselves to be purified. He fully knows those that are truly Godfearing.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: (O Prophet), did you see him who turned away (from the Path of Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ
verses.text: who gave a little, and then stopped? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.text: Does he have any knowledge of the world beyond the ken of sense-perception, and therefore, clearly sees (the Truth)? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.text: Has he not been informed of what is in the Scrolls of Moses,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.text: and of Abraham, who lived up to the trust? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: “That no bearer of a burden shall bear the burden of another, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: and that man shall have nothing but what he has striven for, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.text: and that (the result of) his striving shall soon be seen, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُجْزَىٰهُ ٱلْجَزَآءَ ٱلْأَوْفَىٰ
verses.text: and that he shall then be fully recompensed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: and that the final end is with your Lord,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ
verses.text: and that He it is Who causes people to laugh and to cry, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا
verses.text: and that He it is Who causes death and grants life,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: and He it is Who created the two kinds, the male and the female,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ
verses.text: from a drop of sperm when it was emitted, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: and that it is for Him to grant the second life, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ
verses.text: that He it is Who bestowed wealth and riches, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ
verses.text: that He is the Lord of Sirius, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهْلَكَ عَادًا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: that He it is Who destroyed the ancient 'Ad, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ
verses.text: and Thamud, leaving no trace of them,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
verses.text: and that He it is Who destroyed the people of Noah before for they were much given to iniquity and transgression.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ
verses.text: And He brought perdition upon the subverted cities

verses.arabicUthmani: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.text: and caused them to be covered with that which He covered them with. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.text: So, 1 which of your Lord's bounties will you doubt?” 2

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.text: This is a warning among the warnings of yore. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَزِفَتِ ٱلْـَٔازِفَةُ
verses.text: The imminent Hour has drawn near, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.text: and none but Allah can avert it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ
verses.text: Will you, then, wonder at this? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَضْحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبْكُونَ
verses.text: Will you laugh at it rather than weep? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: Will you occupy yourselves simply in merriment? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩
verses.text: Prostrate yourselves before Allah, and serve Him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: The Hour of Resurrection drew near and the moon split asunder. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
verses.text: (Regardless of any Signs these people see), they turn away and say: “This is an ongoing sorcery.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: They also gave the lie to (the splitting asunder of the moon) and only followed their desires. 1 Yet everything is destined to reach an end. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.text: Surely there came to them narratives (of the ancient nations) that should suffice to deter (them from transgression),

verses.arabicUthmani: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: narratives that are full of consummate wisdom. But warnings do not avail them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
verses.text: So turn away from them, (O Prophet). 1 On the Day when a caller shall call them to a thing most terrible, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
verses.text: with down-cast eyes 1 they shall go forth from their graves, 2 as though they were scattered locusts.

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
verses.text: They shall be hurrying forth towards the caller, and the unbelievers (who had once denied this Day), will say: “This is a woeful Day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
verses.text: Before them Noah's people also gave the lie (to his Message). 1 They rejected Our servant as a liar, saying: “He is a madman”; and he was rebuffed. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.text: Then he called upon His Lord: “Verily I am vanquished; so come You to my aid.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
verses.text: Thereupon We opened the gates of the sky for water to pour down,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.text: and We made the earth burst forth with springs, 1 and all this water converged to fulfil that which had been decreed.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
verses.text: And We bore Noah on the vessel built of planks and nails, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.text: which sailed on under Our supervision: a reward for him who had been shown ingratitude. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And We left the Ark as a Sign. 1 Is there, then, any who will take heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how awesome were My chastisement and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: We have made this Qur'an easy as a reminder. 1 Is there, then, any who will take heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: 'Ad also gave the lie (to Hud). So how awesome were My chastisement and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
verses.text: We sent a tumultuous wind against them on a day of unremitting misfortune, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
verses.text: which tore people away and hurled them as though they were trunks of uprooted palm-trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how awesome were My chastisement and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: We have made the Qur'an easy to derive lessons from. Is there, then, any who will take heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Thamud gave the lie to the warnings,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: saying: “Are we to follow a single mortal, 1 one from among ourselves? If we do that, we shall surely be in error and folly.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
verses.text: Was there none but he to whom the Reminder could be vouchsafed excluding all others? Nay; he is an insolent liar.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.text: (We told Our Messenger): “Tomorrow they shall know who is the insolent liar.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.text: We shall send the she-camel as a trial for them; so watch their end with patience.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
verses.text: Let them know that the water should be divided between them and the she-camel, each availing their turn.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.text: Eventually, they summoned their companion, and he undertook the (outrageous) task and hamstrung the she-camel. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how awesome were My chastisement and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
verses.text: Behold, We sent a single Blast against them, and they became like the trampled twigs of a sheep pen-builder. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Surely We have made this Qur'an easy as a reminder. Is there, then, any who will take heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Lot's people also gave the lie to the warnings,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
verses.text: and behold, We let loose upon them a tempest which rained stones upon them, except upon Lot's household whom We rescued in the last hours of the night

verses.arabicUthmani: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.text: as a favour from Us. Thus do We reward those who give thanks.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Surely Lot warned his people that We shall seize them (with Our chastisement), but they doubted the warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: Then they even solicited his guests from him, whereupon We blotted out their eyes, (telling them): “Now have a taste of My chastisement and My warnings.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: Indeed an abiding chastisement came upon them in the morning.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So have a taste of My chastisement and My warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: Surely We have made this Qur'an easy as a reminder. Is there, then, any who will take heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: Warnings also came to the Pharaonites,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
verses.text: but they gave the lie to Our Signs, to all of them. Thereupon We seized them with the seizing of the Most Mighty, the Most Powerful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: Are your unbelievers (of Makkah) any better than they? 1 Or have you been granted any immunity in the Scriptures?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
verses.text: Or do they say: “We are a strong legion, strong enough for victory?”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.text: Soon shall this legion be routed and shall turn their backs and flee. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.text: Nay; the Hour of Doom is their appointed time, and the Hour shall be more calamitous and bitter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: The evil-doers are victims of error and madness.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.text: There shall come a Day when they will be dragged on their faces into the Fire and will be told: “Now taste the flame of Hell.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
verses.text: We have created everything in a determined measure. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.text: Our command consists of only one Word which is carried out in the twinkling of an eye. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: We did indeed destroy many like you. 1 Is there, then, any who will heed?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: All their deeds are recorded in the Scrolls;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.text: everything large or small, is duly inscribed. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
verses.text: Surely those who shun disobedience will dwell amidst Gardens and running streams

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.text: where they will be honourably seated in the presence of a King, Mighty in Power.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ
verses.text: The Merciful One

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ
verses.text: has taught the Qur'an, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ
verses.text: has created man, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلْبَيَانَ
verses.text: and has taught him articulate speech. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ
verses.text: The sun and the moon follow a reckoning, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ
verses.text: and the stars 1 and the trees all prostrate themselves, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: and He has raised up the heaven and has set a balance 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ
verses.text: that you may not transgress in the balance,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: but weigh things equitably and skimp not in the balance. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ
verses.text: And He 1 has set up the earth for all beings. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ
verses.text: Therein are fruit and palm-trees with their dates in sheaths,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ
verses.text: and a variety of corn with both husk and grain. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the bounties of your Lord 1 will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ
verses.text: He has created man from dry, rotten clay like the potter's, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
verses.text: and has created the jinn from the flame of fire. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the wonders of your Lord's power 1 will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ
verses.text: Lord of the two easts and of the two wests is He. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the powers of your Lord 1 will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
verses.text: He unleashed the two seas so that they merge together,

verses.arabicUthmani: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
verses.text: and yet there is a barrier between them which they may not overstep. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the wonders of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: From these seas come forth pearls 1 and coral. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the wonders of your Lord's power will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.text: His are the ships, 1 towering on the sea like mountains.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ
verses.text: All 1 that is on earth will perish,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: only the Person of your Lord, full of majesty and splendour, will endure.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of the wonders of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
verses.text: All in the heavens and the earth entreat Him for their needs; a new, mighty task engages Him each day. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's laudable attributes will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.text: O you twain, who are a burden (on the earth), 1 We shall attend to you and call you to account. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: (We shall then see), which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
verses.text: O company of jinn and men, if you have the power to go beyond the bounds of the heavens and the earth, go beyond them! Yet you will be unable to go beyond them for that requires infinite power. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's powers will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.text: (If you so venture) a flame of fire and smoke 1 shall be lashed at you, which you shall be unable to withstand.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's powers will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.text: (What will happen) when the heaven will be split asunder and will become crimson like leather? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's powers will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: On that Day there will be no need to ask either men or jinn about their sins. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: (We shall see) which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
verses.text: The culprits shall be known by their marks, and shall be seized by their forelocks and their feet.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the powers of your Lord, will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: (It will be said): “This is the Hell that the culprits had cried lies to.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ
verses.text: They will keep circling around between Hell and boiling water. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's powers will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: For any who fears to stand before his Lord 1 are two Gardens. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَوَاتَآ أَفْنَانٍ
verses.text: These Gardens will abound in green, blooming branches.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ
verses.text: In each of the two Gardens are two flowing springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ
verses.text: In both these is a pair of every fruit. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
verses.text: They shall recline on couches lined with brocade, 1 and within reach shall hang the fruits of the two Gardens.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: In the midst of these shall be maidens with modest, restrained glances; 1 maidens whom no man or jinn has ever touched before. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of your Lord's favours will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: Lovely as rubies and pearls.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ
verses.text: Can the reward of goodness be any other than goodness? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the laudable attributes of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: And besides these two there shall be two other Gardens. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُدْهَآمَّتَانِ
verses.text: Two Gardens, dark green and fresh. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.text: In them will be two gushing springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ
verses.text: Therein will be fruits and dates and pomegranates.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌ
verses.text: In the midst of these will be maidens, good and comely.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ
verses.text: There shall be maidens sheltered in tents. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: No man or jinn ever touched them before.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ
verses.text: They shall be reclining on green cushions and splendid carpets. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: Which of the favours of your Lord will you twain – you men and jinn – then deny?

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: Blessed be the name of your Lord, the Lord of Majesty and Glory.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: When the Event will come to pass

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.text: – and then there will be no one to deny its occurrence 1 –

verses.arabicUthmani: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌ
verses.text: (a calamitous Event) that shall turn things upside down: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا
verses.text: when the earth will suddenly shake with a terrible shaking, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا
verses.text: and the mountains will crumble

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَتْ هَبَآءً مُّنۢبَثًّا
verses.text: and will scatter abroad into fine dust.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً
verses.text: You shall then become three groups. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
verses.text: The People on the Right: 1 and how fortunate will be the People on the Right!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
verses.text: And the People on the Left: 1 and how miserable will be the People on the Left!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ
verses.text: As for the Foremost, they will be the foremost! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: They shall be near-stationed (to their Lord),

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: in the Gardens of Bliss.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: A throng of the ancients,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and a few from later times. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ
verses.text: They (will be seated) on gold-encrusted couches,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: reclining on them, arrayed face to face;

verses.arabicUthmani: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ
verses.text: immortal youths shall go about them 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ
verses.text: with goblets and ewers and a cup filled with a drink drawn from a running spring,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ
verses.text: a drink by which their minds will not be clouded nor will it cause drunkenness; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.text: they will also go about them with the fruits of which they may choose,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: and with the flesh of any fowl that they may desire to eat; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ
verses.text: and there shall be wide-eyed maidens,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ
verses.text: beautiful as pearls hidden in their shells. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: All this shall be theirs as a reward for their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
verses.text: There they shall hear no idle talk nor any sinful speech. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا قِيلًا سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: All talk will be sound and upright. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: As for the People on the Right, how fortunate shall be the people on the Right!

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى سِدْرٍ مَّخْضُودٍ
verses.text: They shall be in the midst of thornless lote trees, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ
verses.text: and flower-clad acacias,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظِلٍّ مَّمْدُودٍ
verses.text: and extended shade,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآءٍ مَّسْكُوبٍ
verses.text: and gushing water,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ
verses.text: and abundant fruit, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ
verses.text: never-ending and unforbidden.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفُرُشٍ مَّرْفُوعَةٍ
verses.text: They shall be on upraised couches,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءً
verses.text: and their spouses We shall have brought them into being afresh,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُنَّ أَبْكَارًا
verses.text: and shall have made them virgins, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عُرُبًا أَتْرَابًا
verses.text: intensely loving 1 and of matching age. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: All this will be for the People on the Right;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: a large throng from the ancients,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and also a large throng from those of later times.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ
verses.text: As for the People on the Left: how miserable will be the People on the Left!

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى سَمُومٍ وَحَمِيمٍ
verses.text: They will be in the midst of scorching wind and boiling water,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظِلٍّ مِّن يَحْمُومٍ
verses.text: and a shade of thick, pitch-black smoke,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا بَارِدٍ وَلَا كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: which will neither be cool nor soothing.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ
verses.text: Surely they had lived before in luxury,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: and had persisted in the Great Sin. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: They used to say: “What! Once we are dead and are reduced to dust and bones, shall we still be raised to a new life from the dead?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.text: (We) and our fore-fathers of yore?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: Tell them, (O Prophet): “The earlier ones and the later ones

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: shall all be brought together on an appointed Day.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Then you, the erring ones and those that gave the lie to the Truth,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ
verses.text: shall all eat from the Tree of al-Zaqqum, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.text: filling your bellies with it;

verses.arabicUthmani: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.text: and thereupon you shall drink boiling water,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ
verses.text: drinking it as thirsty camels do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا نُزُلُهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Thus shall they be entertained on the Day of Recompense.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
verses.text: We have created you, 1 then why would you not confirm it? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ
verses.text: Did you ever consider the sperm that you emit?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Do you create a child out of it, or are We its creators? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.text: It is We Who ordained death upon you 1 and We are not to be frustrated.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Had We so wished, nothing could have hindered Us from replacing you by others like yourselves, or transforming you into beings you know nothing about. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: You are well aware of the first creation; then, do you learn no lesson from it? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ
verses.text: Have you considered the seeds you till?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ
verses.text: Is it you or We Who make them grow? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
verses.text: If We so wished, We could have reduced your harvest to rubble, and you would have been left wonder-struck to exclaim:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ
verses.text: “We have been penalised;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.text: nay; we have been undone!”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ
verses.text: Did you cast a good look at the water that you drink?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
verses.text: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds or is it We Who brought it down? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: If We had so pleased, We could have made it bitter. 1 So why would you not give thanks? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ
verses.text: Did you consider the fire which you kindle?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.text: Did you make its tree 1 grow or was it We Who made it grow?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ
verses.text: We made it a reminder 1 and a provision for the needy. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Glorify, then, (O Prophet), the name of your Great Lord. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: No! 1 I swear by the positions of the stars –

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَقَسَمٌ لَّوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: and this is indeed a mighty oath, if only you knew –

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقُرْءَانٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: that this indeed is a noble Qur'an, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مَّكْنُونٍ
verses.text: inscribed in a well-guarded Book, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ
verses.text: which none but the pure may touch; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: a revelation from the Lord of the Universe.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ
verses.text: Do you, then, take this discourse in light esteem, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: and your portion in it is simply that you denounce it as false? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ
verses.text: Why, then, when the soul leaps up to the throat,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: the while you are helplessly watching that he is on the verge of death,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: – at that moment when We are closer to him than you, although you do not see (Us)

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ
verses.text: if you are not subject to anyone's authority,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: why are you then not able to bring them back to life if you are truthful?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.text: So if he is one of those who are near-stationed (to Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: then happiness and delight and Gardens of Bliss are his.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: And if he is one of the People on the Right,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَلَـٰمٌ لَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: he will be welcomed by the words: “Peace to you” from the People on the Right.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: And if he is one of those who give the lie (to this Message) and go astray,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: then he will be served boiling water,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَصْلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ
verses.text: and will be scorched by the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: That indeed is the absolute truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So glorify the name of your Great Lord. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: All that is in the heavens and the earth extols the glory of Allah. 1 He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: His is the dominion of the heavens and the earth. He gives life and causes death, and He has power over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: He is the First and the Last, and the Manifest and the Hidden, 1 and He has knowledge of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا ۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: He it is Who created the heavens and the earth in six days and then established Himself on the Throne. 1 He knows all that enters the earth and all that comes forth from it, and all that comes down from the heaven and all that goes up to it. 2 He is with you wherever you are. 3 Allah sees all that you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
verses.text: His is the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and to Him are all matters referred (for judgement).

verses.arabicUthmani: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيْلَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِى ٱلَّيْلِ ۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: He causes the night to pass into the day, and causes the day to pass into the night, and He fully knows all that is hidden in the breasts of people.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Believe in Allah and in His Messenger 1 and expend 2 of what He has entrusted to you. 3 A great reward awaits those of you who believe and spend their wealth. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَـٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: How is it that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord 1 and although he has taken a covenant from you, 2 if indeed you are believers?

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: He it is Who sends down Clear Signs to His servant so as to bring you out from darkness into light. Surely Allah is Most Kind and Most Compassionate to you.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَكُمْ أَلَّا تُنفِقُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَا يَسْتَوِى مِنكُم مَّنْ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبْلِ ٱلْفَتْحِ وَقَـٰتَلَ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَعْظَمُ دَرَجَةً مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدُ وَقَـٰتَلُوا۟ ۚ وَكُلًّا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: How is it that you do not expend in the Way of Allah when to Allah belongs the inheritance of the heavens and the earth? 1 Those who spent their wealth and took part in fighting before the Victory cannot be equated (with those who spent their wealth and took part in fighting afterwards). They are higher in rank than those who spent and fought afterwards. 2 But to each Allah has promised a good reward. Allah is well aware of all that you do. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا فَيُضَـٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Who is it that will give Allah a beautiful loan? A loan that Allah will repay after increasing it many times and grant him a generous reward. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ يَسْعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَـٰنِهِم بُشْرَىٰكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: On that Day you will see believing men and women that their light will be running before them and on their right hands. 1 (They will be told): “A good tiding to you today.” There shall be Gardens beneath which rivers flow; therein they shall abide. That indeed is the great triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقَـٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقْتَبِسْ مِن نُّورِكُمْ قِيلَ ٱرْجِعُوا۟ وَرَآءَكُمْ فَٱلْتَمِسُوا۟ نُورًا فَضُرِبَ بَيْنَهُم بِسُورٍ لَّهُۥ بَابٌۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحْمَةُ وَظَـٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلْعَذَابُ
verses.text: On that Day the hypocrites, both men and women, shall say to the believers: “Look at us that we may extract some light from your light.” 1 They will be told: “Go back and seek light for yourselves elsewhere.” Then a wall shall be erected between them with a door in it. On the inside of it there will be mercy, and on the outside of it there will be chastisement. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: يُنَادُونَهُمْ أَلَمْ نَكُن مَّعَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَلَـٰكِنَّكُمْ فَتَنتُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتَرَبَّصْتُمْ وَٱرْتَبْتُمْ وَغَرَّتْكُمُ ٱلْأَمَانِىُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ
verses.text: The hypocrites will call out to the believers: “Were we not with you?” 1 The believers will reply: “Yes; but you allowed yourselves to succumb to temptations, 2 and you wavered 3 and you remained in doubt 4 and false expectations deluded you until Allah's command came to pass, 5 and the Deluder 6 deluded you concerning Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنكُمْ فِدْيَةٌ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ مَأْوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ هِىَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: So no ransom shall be accepted from you today, nor from those who disbelieved. 1 You are destined for the Fire. That will be your guardian. 2 And that indeed is a grievous destination.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ مِن قَبْلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْأَمَدُ فَقَسَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Is the time not come that the hearts of the believers should be humbled to Allah's remembrance and to the Truth that He has revealed, 1 and that they should not be like those who were vouchsafed the Book and then a long time elapsed so that their hearts were hardened? A great many of them are now evil-doers. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Know well that Allah revives the earth after it becomes lifeless. We have clearly shown Our Signs to you, perchance you will use your reason. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَـٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Verily those who give alms 1 be they men or women, and give Allah a beautiful loan shall be repaid after increasing it many times; and theirs shall be a generous reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ ۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ وَنُورُهُمْ ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: In Allah's sight only those who truly believe in Allah and His Messengers 1 are utterly truthful 2 and true bearers of witness(for the sake of Allah). 3 For them is their reward and their light. 4 As for those who gave the lie to Our Signs, they are the people of Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌ وَلَهْوٌ وَزِينَةٌ وَتَفَاخُرٌۢ بَيْنَكُمْ وَتَكَاثُرٌ فِى ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَوْلَـٰدِ ۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيْثٍ أَعْجَبَ ٱلْكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَـٰمًا ۖ وَفِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنٌ ۚ وَمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ إِلَّا مَتَـٰعُ ٱلْغُرُورِ
verses.text: Know well that the life of this world is merely sport and diversion and adornment and an object of your boasting with one another, and a rivalry in the multiplication of riches and children. Its likeness is that of rain: when it produces vegetation it delights the tillers. But then it withers and you see it turn yellow, and then it crumbles away. In the Hereafter there is (either) grievous chastisement (or) forgiveness from Allah and (His) good pleasure. The life of this world is nothing but delusion. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So vie with one another 1 in seeking to attain your Lord's forgiveness and a Garden whose width is as the width of the heaven and the earth, 2 one which has been prepared for those who believe in Allah and His Messengers. That is Allah's bounty which He bestows upon those whom He pleases. Allah is the Lord of abounding bounty.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ إِلَّا فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن نَّبْرَأَهَآ ۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: No misfortune ever befalls on earth, nor on yourselves but We have inscribed it in the Book 1 before We make it manifest. 2 Surely that is easy for Allah. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ
verses.text: (We do so) that you may not grieve over 1 the loss you suffer, nor exult over what He gave you. Allah does not love the vainglorious, the boastful,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: those who are niggardly and bid others to be niggardly. 1 And he who turns away, (should know that) Allah is Self-Sufficient, Immensely Praiseworthy. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَأَنزَلْنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَأَنزَلْنَا ٱلْحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأْسٌ شَدِيدٌ وَمَنَـٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
verses.text: Indeed We sent Our Messengers with Clear Signs, and sent down with them the Book and the Balance that people may uphold justice. 1 And We sent down iron, wherein there is awesome power and many benefits for people, 2 so that Allah may know who, without even having seen Him, helps Him and His Messengers. Surely Allah is Most Strong, Most Mighty. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Indeed We 1 sent forth Noah and Abraham and established in their line Prophecy and the Book. 2 Then some of them embraced the guidance and many of them are wicked. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قَفَّيْنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيْنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْإِنجِيلَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأْفَةً وَرَحْمَةً وَرَهْبَانِيَّةً ٱبْتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبْنَـٰهَا عَلَيْهِمْ إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ رِضْوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوْهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَا ۖ فَـَٔاتَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ أَجْرَهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: In their wake, We sent a succession of Our Messengers, and raised Jesus, son of Mary, after all of them, and bestowed upon him the Evangel, and We set tenderness and mercy 1 in the hearts of those that followed him. As for monasticism, 2 it is they who invented it; 3 We did not prescribe it for them. They themselves invented it in pursuit of Allah's good pleasure, and then they did not observe it as it ought to have been observed. 4 So We gave their reward to those of them that believed. But many of them are wicked.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Believers, have fear of Allah and believe in His Messenger, 1 and He will grant you a two-fold portion of His Mercy, and will appoint for you a light whereby you shall walk; 2 and He will forgive you. 3 Allah is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: (You should do this) so that the People of the Book know that they have no control over Allah's Bounty, and that all bounty is in Allah's Hand; He bestows it on whomsoever He pleases. Allah is the Lord of abounding bounty.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ سَمِعَ ٱللَّهُ قَوْلَ ٱلَّتِى تُجَـٰدِلُكَ فِى زَوْجِهَا وَتَشْتَكِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَٱللَّهُ يَسْمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَآ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Allah 1 has surely heard the words of her who contends with you concerning her husband and complains to Allah. Allah hears what both of you say. 2 Verily Allah is All- Hearing, All-Seeing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُظَـٰهِرُونَ مِنكُم مِّن نِّسَآئِهِم مَّا هُنَّ أُمَّهَـٰتِهِمْ ۖ إِنْ أُمَّهَـٰتُهُمْ إِلَّا ٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى وَلَدْنَهُمْ ۚ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَقُولُونَ مُنكَرًا مِّنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَزُورًا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُورٌ
verses.text: Those among you who divorce their wives by declaring them to be their mothers, 1 such are not their mothers; none are their mothers except those who gave birth to them. 2 Indeed what they say is highly contemptible and false. 3 Verily Allah is Most Pardoning, Most Forgiving. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُظَـٰهِرُونَ مِن نِّسَآئِهِمْ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا قَالُوا۟ فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ تُوعَظُونَ بِهِۦ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Those 1 who declare their wives to be their mothers and thereafter go back on what they have said 2 shall free a slave before they may touch each other. That is what you are exhorted to do. 3 Allah is fully aware of all your deeds. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن لَّمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۖ فَمَن لَّمْ يَسْتَطِعْ فَإِطْعَامُ سِتِّينَ مِسْكِينًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَلِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: And he who does not find a slave (to free), shall fast for two months consecutively before they may touch each other; and he who is unable to do so shall feed sixty needy people. 1 All this is in order that you may truly believe in Allah and His Messenger. 2 These are the bounds set by Allah; and a grievous chastisement awaits the unbelievers. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ كُبِتُوا۟ كَمَا كُبِتَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ وَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ ۚ وَلِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ
verses.text: Verily those who oppose Allah and His Messenger 1 shall be brought low even as those before them were brought low. 2 Surely We have sent down Clear Signs; and a humiliating chastisement awaits the unbelievers; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًا فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟ ۚ أَحْصَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ وَنَسُوهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: a chastisement that shall come upon them on the Day when Allah will raise them all to a new life and will inform them of their deeds. 1 Allah has recorded it all while they have forgotten it. Allah is a witness over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ مَا يَكُونُ مِن نَّجْوَىٰ ثَلَـٰثَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ وَلَا خَمْسَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ سَادِسُهُمْ وَلَآ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ذَٰلِكَ وَلَآ أَكْثَرَ إِلَّا هُوَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كَانُوا۟ ۖ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Are you not aware 1 that Allah knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth? Never is there any whispering among three but He is their fourth; nor among five but He is their sixth; 2 nor fewer nor more but He is with them wherever they may be. 3 And then He will tell them on the Day of Judgement all that they have done. Surely Allah knows everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نُهُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا نُهُوا۟ عَنْهُ وَيَتَنَـٰجَوْنَ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَإِذَا جَآءُوكَ حَيَّوْكَ بِمَا لَمْ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ وَيَقُولُونَ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَوْلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا ٱللَّهُ بِمَا نَقُولُ ۚ حَسْبُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ يَصْلَوْنَهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Have you not seen those who were forbidden to whisper and yet they engaged in what they had been forbidden? 1 They secretly converse among themselves concerning sin and transgression and disobedience to the Messenger. And when they come to you, they greet you in a manner that Allah does not greet you, 2 and say to themselves: “Why does Allah not chastise us for these utterances of ours?” 3 Hell it is that shall suffice them, and in it will they burn. How woeful is their destination!

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَـٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: Believers, when you converse in secrecy, let that not be concerning sin and transgression and disobedience to the Messenger; rather, converse concerning virtue and piety. And fear Allah to Whom all of you shall be mustered. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Whispering is an act of Satan, one that aims at causing grief to the believers; yet without Allah's leave no harm can be caused to them. So in Allah should the believers put all their trust. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُوا۟ فِى ٱلْمَجَـٰلِسِ فَٱفْسَحُوا۟ يَفْسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشُزُوا۟ فَٱنشُزُوا۟ يَرْفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ دَرَجَـٰتٍ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Believers, when you are told: “Make room for one another in your assemblies,” then make room; Allah will bestow amplitude on you. 1 And when it is said: “Rise up,” then rise up; 2 Allah will raise to high ranks 3 those of you who believe and are endowed with knowledge. Allah is well aware of all that you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نَـٰجَيْتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَةً ۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ وَأَطْهَرُ ۚ فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Believers, when you come to the Messenger for private consultation, offer some charity before your consultation with him. 1 That is better for you and more conducive to purity. But if you find nothing to offer in charity, then know that Allah is Most Merciful, Most Compassionate.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَشْفَقْتُمْ أَن تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَـٰتٍ ۚ فَإِذْ لَمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَتَابَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمْ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Are you afraid that you will have to offer charity when you hold private conversation with the Prophet? But if you are unable to do so and Allah pardons you, then establish Prayer and pay Zakah, and obey Allah and His Messenger. Allah is well aware of all that you do. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مَّا هُم مِّنكُمْ وَلَا مِنْهُمْ وَيَحْلِفُونَ عَلَى ٱلْكَذِبِ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Do you not see those who took for friends a people whom Allah is wroth with? 1 They neither belong to you nor you to them. 2 They swear to a falsehood, and they do so knowingly. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Allah has prepared for them a grievous chastisement. Indeed, evil are the acts in which they are engaged.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ
verses.text: They have taken their oaths as a shield by means of which they hinder people from the Way of Allah. 1 Theirs shall be a humiliating chastisement.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّن تُغْنِىَ عَنْهُمْ أَمْوَٰلُهُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Neither their possessions nor their offspring will be of any avail to them against Allah. They are the people of the Fire; therein they shall abide.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًا فَيَحْلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحْلِفُونَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when Allah will raise them all from the dead they will swear before Him as they swear before you today, 1 thinking that this will avail them. Behold, they are utter liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: Satan has gained mastery over them and has made them neglect remembering Allah. They are the party of Satan. Behold, the party of Satan will be the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ
verses.text: Verily those who oppose Allah and His Messenger will be among the most abject beings.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
verses.text: Allah has written: “Surely I will prevail; I and My Messengers.” 1 Verily Allah is Most Strong, Most Mighty.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوْمًا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنْ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوْ كَانُوٓا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ أَوْ أَبْنَآءَهُمْ أَوْ إِخْوَٰنَهُمْ أَوْ عَشِيرَتَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٍ مِّنْهُ ۖ وَيُدْخِلُهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: You shall not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day befriending those who oppose Allah and His Messenger even though they be their fathers or their sons or their brothers or their kindred. 1 He has inscribed faith in their hearts and has strengthened them with a spirit from Him, and He shall make them enter Gardens beneath which rivers flow. Therein they shall abide. Allah is well-pleased with them, and they are well-pleased with Him. They belong to Allah's party. Verily Allah's party shall prosper.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: All that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth extols Allah's Glory: He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ لِأَوَّلِ ٱلْحَشْرِ ۚ مَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن يَخْرُجُوا۟ ۖ وَظَنُّوٓا۟ أَنَّهُم مَّانِعَتُهُمْ حُصُونُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَمْ يَحْتَسِبُوا۟ ۖ وَقَذَفَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلرُّعْبَ ۚ يُخْرِبُونَ بُيُوتَهُم بِأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَيْدِى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَٱعْتَبِرُوا۟ يَـٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرِ
verses.text: He it is Who in the first assault drove forth the People of the Book that disbelieved from their homes 1 at the first gathering of forces. 2 You did not believe that they would leave; while they too thought that their fortresses would defend them against Allah. 3 Then Allah came upon them from whence they did not even imagine, 4 casting such terror into their hearts that they destroyed their homes by their own hands and their destruction was also caused by the hands of the believers. 5 So learn a lesson from this, O you who have perceptive eyes! 6

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْلَآ أَن كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَذَابُ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: If Allah had not decreed banishment for them, He would certainly have chastised them in this world. 1 As for the Hereafter, the chastisement of the Fire awaits them.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ شَآقُّوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۖ وَمَن يُشَآقِّ ٱللَّهَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ
verses.text: That is because they set themselves against Allah and His Messenger; and whoever sets himself against Allah should know that Allah is surely Most Stern in retribution.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: The palm-trees that you cut down or those that you left standing on their roots, it was by Allah's leave that you did so. 1 (Allah granted you this leave) in order that He might humiliate the evil-doers. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَوْجَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَيْلٍ وَلَا رِكَابٍ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Whatever Allah has taken away from them and bestowed (as spoils) on His Messenger 1 for which you spurred neither horses nor camels; but Allah grants authority to His Messengers over whomsoever He pleases. Allah has power over everything. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْقُرَىٰ فَلِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ وَلِذِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْيَتَـٰمَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَـٰكِينِ وَٱبْنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ كَىْ لَا يَكُونَ دُولَةًۢ بَيْنَ ٱلْأَغْنِيَآءِ مِنكُمْ ۚ وَمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمُ ٱلرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ وَمَا نَهَىٰكُمْ عَنْهُ فَٱنتَهُوا۟ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ
verses.text: Whatever (from the possessions of the towns people) Allah has bestowed on His Messenger belongs to Allah, and to the Messenger, and to his kinsfolk, and to the orphans, and to the needy, and to the wayfarer 1 so that it may not merely circulate between the rich among you. 2 So accept whatever the Messenger gives you, and refrain from whatever he forbids you. And fear Allah: verily Allah is Most Stern in retribution. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: لِلْفُقَرَآءِ ٱلْمُهَـٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخْرِجُوا۟ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ وَأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: It also belongs to the poor Emigrants who have been driven out of their homes and their possessions, 1 those who seek Allah's favour and good pleasure and help Allah and His Messenger. Such are the truthful ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُو ٱلدَّارَ وَٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ يُحِبُّونَ مَنْ هَاجَرَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَا يَجِدُونَ فِى صُدُورِهِمْ حَاجَةً مِّمَّآ أُوتُوا۟ وَيُؤْثِرُونَ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَوْ كَانَ بِهِمْ خَصَاصَةٌ ۚ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: It also belongs to those who were already settled in this abode (of Hijrah) 1 having come to faith before the (arrival of the) Muhajirun (Emigrants).They love those who have migrated to them and do not covet what has been given them; they even prefer them above themselves though poverty be their own lot. 2 And whosoever are preserved from their own greed, such are the ones that will prosper. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: (And it also belongs to) those who came after them, 1 and who pray: “Lord, forgive us and our brethren who have preceded us in faith, and do not put in our hearts any rancour towards those who believe. Lord, You are the Most Tender, the Most Compassionate.” 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نَافَقُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ لِإِخْوَٰنِهِمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ لَئِنْ أُخْرِجْتُمْ لَنَخْرُجَنَّ مَعَكُمْ وَلَا نُطِيعُ فِيكُمْ أَحَدًا أَبَدًا وَإِن قُوتِلْتُمْ لَنَنصُرَنَّكُمْ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: Did 1 you not see the hypocrites say to their brethren, the unbelievers among the People of the Book: “If you are banished we too will go with you and will not listen to anyone concerning you; and if war is waged against you, we will come to your aid.” But Allah bears witness that they are liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: To be sure, if they are banished, they will not go with them and if war is waged against them, they will not aid them; and even if they provide any aid to them, they will still turn their backs, and thereafter no aid will be forthcoming to them.
