verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ رَهْبَةً فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: Surely they have greater dread for you in their hearts than for Allah. 1 That is because they are a people who are devoid of understanding. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يُقَـٰتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِى قُرًى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِن وَرَآءِ جُدُرٍۭ ۚ بَأْسُهُم بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌ ۚ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعًا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّىٰ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: They will never fight against you as a body (in an open battlefield); and if they fight against you they will fight only in fortified townships or from behind walls. Intense is their hostility to one another. You reckon them united while their hearts are divided. 1 That is because they are a people devoid of reason.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ قَرِيبًا ۖ ذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: They are like those who tasted the evil consequences of their deeds 1 a short while before. A grievous chastisement awaits them.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمَثَلِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ إِذْ قَالَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ ٱكْفُرْ فَلَمَّا كَفَرَ قَالَ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّنكَ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Their parable is that of Satan when he says to man: “Disbelieve,” but when he disbelieves, he says: “I am quit of you. Verily I fear Allah, the Lord of the Universe.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَتَهُمَآ أَنَّهُمَا فِى ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدَيْنِ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: In the end both will be in the Fire, and will abide in it. That is the recompense of the wrong-doers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Believers, 1 fear Allah and let every person look to what he sends forward for the morrow. 2 Fear Allah; Allah is well aware of all that you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: And be not like those who forgot Allah and so He made them oblivious of themselves. 1 They are the wicked ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْتَوِىٓ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۚ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
verses.text: Those destined for the Fire and those destined for Paradise cannot be alike. Verily it is those destined for Paradise who shall triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَـٰشِعًا مُّتَصَدِّعًا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Had We sent down this Qur'an upon a mountain you would indeed have seen it humbling itself and breaking asunder out of fear of Allah. 1 We propound such parables to people that they may reflect.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: He 1 is Allah: there is no god but He; 2 the Knower of the unseen and the manifest, 3 He is the Most Merciful, the Most Compassionate. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَـٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: He is Allah: there is no god but He: the King, 1 the Holy, 2 the All-Peace, 3 the Giver of security, 4 the Overseer, 5 the Most Mighty, 6 the Overpowering, 7 the All-Great. 8 Exalted be He from whatever they associate with Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُ ٱلْبَارِئُ ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: He is Allah, the Planner, 1 Executer and Fashioner of creation. 2 His are the names most beautiful. 3 Whatever is in the heavens and the earth extols His Glory. 4 He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise. 5

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَـٰدًا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
verses.text: Believers, 1 if you have left (your homes and) have come forth to struggle in My Way and to seek My good pleasure, do not make friends with My enemies and your enemies. You befriend them whereas they have spurned the Truth that has come to you; and (such is their enmity that) they expel the Messenger and yourselves for no other reason than that you believe in Allah, your Lord. You send to them messages of friendship in secrecy, although I know well whatever you do, be it secretly or publicly. And whosoever of you does so has indeed strayed far away from the Straight Path.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءً وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: If they could overcome you, they would act as your foes and would hurt you by their hands and tongues, and would love to see you become unbelievers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَن تَنفَعَكُمْ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ ۚ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: On the Day of Resurrection neither your blood-kindred nor your own offspring will avail you. 1 (On that Day) He will separate you. 2 Allah sees all that you do. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ كَانَتْ لَكُمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ فِىٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِذْ قَالُوا۟ لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِنَّا بُرَءَٰٓؤُا۟ مِنكُمْ وَمِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَفَرْنَا بِكُمْ وَبَدَا بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْعَدَٰوَةُ وَٱلْبَغْضَآءُ أَبَدًا حَتَّىٰ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَوْلَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ لِأَبِيهِ لَأَسْتَغْفِرَنَّ لَكَ وَمَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍ ۖ رَّبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: You have a good example in Abraham and his companions: they said to their people: “We totally dissociate ourselves from you, and from the deities that you worship instead of Allah. We renounce you 1 and there has come to be enmity and hatred between us and you until you believe in Allah, the One True God.” (But you may not emulate) Abraham's saying to his father: “Certainly I will ask pardon for you, although I have no power over Allah to obtain anything on your behalf.” 2 (And Abraham and his companions prayed): “Our Lord, in You have we put our trust, and to You have we turned, and to You is our ultimate return.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Our Lord, do not make us a test for the unbelievers, 1 and forgive us, our Lord. Surely You are Most Mighty, Most Wise.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِيهِمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: Indeed there is a good example for you in them; a good example for anyone who looks forward to Allah and the Last Day. 1 As for him who turns away, Allah is All-Sufficient, Immensely Praiseworthy. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: It may well be that Allah will implant love between you and those with whom you have had enmity. 1 Allah is Most Powerful; and Allah is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَـٰتِلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ
verses.text: Allah does not forbid that you be kind and just to those who did not fight against you on account of religion, nor drove you out of your homes. Surely Allah loves those who are equitable. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ وَظَـٰهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: Allah only forbids you to be friends with those who have fought against you on account of religion and who have driven you out of your homes and have abetted in your expulsion. And any who make friends with them, they are the wrong-doers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا جَآءَكُمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتُ مُهَـٰجِرَٰتٍ فَٱمْتَحِنُوهُنَّ ۖ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِإِيمَـٰنِهِنَّ ۖ فَإِنْ عَلِمْتُمُوهُنَّ مُؤْمِنَـٰتٍ فَلَا تَرْجِعُوهُنَّ إِلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ ۖ لَا هُنَّ حِلٌّ لَّهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحِلُّونَ لَهُنَّ ۖ وَءَاتُوهُم مَّآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ وَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ أَن تَنكِحُوهُنَّ إِذَآ ءَاتَيْتُمُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ ۚ وَلَا تُمْسِكُوا۟ بِعِصَمِ ٱلْكَوَافِرِ وَسْـَٔلُوا۟ مَآ أَنفَقْتُمْ وَلْيَسْـَٔلُوا۟ مَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ حُكْمُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: Believers, when believing women come to you as Emigrants (in the cause of faith), examine them. Allah fully knows (the truth) concerning their faith. And when you have ascertained them to be believing women, do not send them back to the unbelievers. 1 Those women are no longer lawful to the unbelievers, nor are those unbelievers lawful to those (believing) women. Give their unbelieving husbands whatever they have spent (as bridal-dues); and there is no offence for you to marry those women if you give them their bridal-dues. 2 Do not hold on to your marriages with unbelieving women: ask for the return of the bridal-due you gave to your unbelieving wives and the unbelievers may ask for the return of the bridal-due they had given to their believing wives. 3 Such is Allah's command. He judges between you. Allah is All-Knowing, Most Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن فَاتَكُمْ شَىْءٌ مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُمْ إِلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ فَعَاقَبْتُمْ فَـَٔاتُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ذَهَبَتْ أَزْوَٰجُهُم مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنتُم بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: And if you fail to receive from the unbelievers a part of the bridal-due of your disbelieving wives, and then your turn comes, pay to those who have been left on the other side an amount the like of the bridal-due that they have paid. 1 And have fear of Allah in Whom you believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتُ يُبَايِعْنَكَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن لَّا يُشْرِكْنَ بِٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَسْرِقْنَ وَلَا يَزْنِينَ وَلَا يَقْتُلْنَ أَوْلَـٰدَهُنَّ وَلَا يَأْتِينَ بِبُهْتَـٰنٍ يَفْتَرِينَهُۥ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِنَّ وَأَرْجُلِهِنَّ وَلَا يَعْصِينَكَ فِى مَعْرُوفٍ ۙ فَبَايِعْهُنَّ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُنَّ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O Prophet, when believing women come to you and pledge 1 to you that they will not associate aught with Allah in His Divinity, that they will not steal, 2 that they will not commit illicit sexual intercourse, that they will not kill their children, 3 that they will not bring forth a calumny between their hands and feet, 4 and that they will not disobey you in anything known to be good, 5 then accept their allegiance 6 and ask Allah to forgive them. Surely Allah is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ قَدْ يَئِسُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ كَمَا يَئِسَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.text: Believers, do not make friends with those against whom Allah is wrathful and who are despaired of the Hereafter, as despaired as are the unbelievers lying in their graves. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: All that is in the heavens and all that is on earth extols Allah's glory. He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: Believers, why do you profess that which you do not practise?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: It is most loathsome in the sight of Allah that you should profess what you do not practise. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَـٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ
verses.text: Allah indeed loves those who fight in His Way as though they are a solid wall cemented with molten lead. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يَـٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تُؤْذُونَنِى وَقَد تَّعْلَمُونَ أَنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوٓا۟ أَزَاغَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And call to mind when Moses said to his people: “O my people, why do you torment me when you know well that I am Allah's Messenger to you?” 1 So when they deviated, Allah made their hearts deviant. Allah does not direct the evil-doers to the Right Way. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَـٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَىَّ مِنَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَمُبَشِّرًۢا بِرَسُولٍ يَأْتِى مِنۢ بَعْدِى ٱسْمُهُۥٓ أَحْمَدُ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: And call 1 to mind when Jesus, son of Mary, said: “O Children of Israel, I am Allah's Messenger to you, I verify the Torah which has come before me, 2 and I give you the glad tiding of a Messenger who shall come after me, his name being Ahmad.” 3 Yet when he came to them with Clear Signs they said: “This is sheer trickery.” 4

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Who would be more unjust than he who invents a lie about Allah 1 the while he is being called to Islam? 2 Allah does not direct such evildoing folk to the Right Way.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرِيدُونَ لِيُطْفِـُٔوا۟ نُورَ ٱللَّهِ بِأَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَٱللَّهُ مُتِمُّ نُورِهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: They seek to extinguish Allah's light (by blowing) with their mouths, but Allah shall spread His light in all its fullness, howsoever the unbelievers may abhor this. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: He it is Who has sent forth the Messenger with the Guidance and the True Religion that He may make it prevail over all religion, however those that associate aught with Allah in His Divinity might dislike this. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ تِجَـٰرَةٍ تُنجِيكُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Believers, shall I direct you to a commerce 1 that will deliver you from a grievous chastisement?

verses.arabicUthmani: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَـٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Have faith in Allah and His Messenger 1 and strive in the Way of Allah with your possessions and your lives. That is better for you if you only knew. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ وَمَسَـٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِى جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: He will forgive you your sins and will admit you to Gardens beneath which rivers flow. He will lodge you in excellent mansions in the Gardens of eternity. That is the supreme triumph. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا ۖ نَصْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: He will also grant you the other favour that you desire: help from Allah and a victory that will come soon. 1 Give glad tidings of this to the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوٓا۟ أَنصَارَ ٱللَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنْ أَنصَارِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ قَالَ ٱلْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٌ مِّنۢ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٌ ۖ فَأَيَّدْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ ظَـٰهِرِينَ
verses.text: Believers, become Allah's helpers, as Jesus, son of Mary, said to the disciples: 1 “Who is my helper in (calling people) to Allah?” The disciples had responded by saying: “We are Allah's helpers.” 2 Then a section of the Children of Israel believed and a section rejected the call. Thereafter We aided the believers against their enemies, and they prevailed. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: All that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth extols the glory of Allah, the Sovereign, the Holy, the All- Mighty, the All-Wise. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ فِى ٱلْأُمِّيِّـۧنَ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَإِن كَانُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: He it is Who has sent to the gentiles a Messenger from among themselves, 1 one who rehearses to them His verses, purifies their lives, and imparts to them the Book and the Wisdom 2 although before that they were in utter error; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِمْ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: and (He has also) sent him to those others who have not yet joined them. 1 He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Such is Allah's favour: He bestows it on whomsoever He pleases. Allah is the Lord of abounding favour.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا۟ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا كَمَثَلِ ٱلْحِمَارِ يَحْمِلُ أَسْفَارًۢا ۚ بِئْسَ مَثَلُ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: The parable of those who were charged with the Torah and then they failed to live up to it 1 is that of a donkey 2 laden with books. Even more evil is the parable of the people who gave the lie to the Signs of Allah. 3 Allah does not direct such wrong-doers to the Right Way.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Tell them: “O you who have become Judaised, 1 if you arrogantly fancy that you are Allah's favourites 2 to the exclusion of all people, then wish for death, if you are truthful in your claim.” 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُۥٓ أَبَدًۢا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: But they shall never wish for death because of the (evil) deeds they have committed. 1 Allah is well aware of these evil-doers.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْمَوْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَفِرُّونَ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ مُلَـٰقِيكُمْ ۖ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Tell them: “The death from which you flee will certainly overtake you. Then you will be returned to Him Who fully knows what is hidden and what is manifest. Thereupon He will let you know all that you used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نُودِىَ لِلصَّلَوٰةِ مِن يَوْمِ ٱلْجُمُعَةِ فَٱسْعَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَذَرُوا۟ ٱلْبَيْعَ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Believers, when the call for Prayer is made on Friday, 1 hasten to the remembrance of Allah and give up all trading. 2 That is better for you, if you only knew.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا قُضِيَتِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةُ فَٱنتَشِرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱذْكُرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: But when the Prayer is ended, disperse in the land and seek Allah's Bounty, 1 and remember Allah much 2 so that you may prosper. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ تِجَـٰرَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا ٱنفَضُّوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَآئِمًا ۚ قُلْ مَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ ٱلتِّجَـٰرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
verses.text: Yet no sooner than they saw some trading or amusement, they flocked to it and left you standing by yourself. 1 Tell them: “That which is with Allah is far better than amusement and trading. 2 Allah is the Best Provider of sustenance.” 3

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ قَالُوا۟ نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: (O Prophet), when the hypocrites come to you, they say: “We bear witness that you are certainly Allah's Messenger.” Allah certainly knows that you are His Messenger. But Allah also bears witness that the hypocrites are utter liars! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: They shelter behind their oath, 1 and thus hinder their own selves and others from the Path of Allah. 2 Evil indeed is what they do.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا۟ فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: All that is because they first believed and then disbelieved, and therefore a seal was set on their hearts; as a result they understand nothing. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ تُعْجِبُكَ أَجْسَامُهُمْ ۖ وَإِن يَقُولُوا۟ تَسْمَعْ لِقَوْلِهِمْ ۖ كَأَنَّهُمْ خُشُبٌ مُّسَنَّدَةٌ ۖ يَحْسَبُونَ كُلَّ صَيْحَةٍ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ هُمُ ٱلْعَدُوُّ فَٱحْذَرْهُمْ ۚ قَـٰتَلَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۖ أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
verses.text: When you look at them, their persons are pleasing, and when they speak, you pay heed to what they say. 1 But in truth they are (merely) beams of timber propped-up (against a wall). 2 They consider every shout they hear to be directed against them. 3 They are your utter enemies; 4 guard against them. 5 May Allah do away with them! 6 How are they being turned away (from the Truth)? 7

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْا۟ يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ لَوَّوْا۟ رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
verses.text: When it is said to them: “Come, Allah's Messenger will seek forgiveness for you,” they (contemptuously) shake their heads and you see them holding back in pride. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or not; for Allah shall never forgive them. 1 Surely Allah does not direct the transgressing folk to the Right Way. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ لَا تُنفِقُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَنْ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ حَتَّىٰ يَنفَضُّوا۟ ۗ وَلِلَّهِ خَزَآئِنُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: It is they who say: “Give nothing to those who are with the Messenger of Allah so that they may disperse.” (They say so although) the treasures of the heavens and the earth belong to Allah. But the hypocrites do not understand.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُونَ لَئِن رَّجَعْنَآ إِلَى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ لَيُخْرِجَنَّ ٱلْأَعَزُّ مِنْهَا ٱلْأَذَلَّ ۚ وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُولِهِۦ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: They say: “When we return to Madinah, the honourable ones will drive out from it those that are abject.” 1 In truth, all honour belongs to Allah, and to His Messenger, and to the believers. 2 But the hypocrites do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: Believers, 1 let your possessions and your offspring not make you negligent of Allah's remembrance. 2 For whoso does that, they will be the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِن مَّا رَزَقْنَـٰكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ أَحَدَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ فَيَقُولَ رَبِّ لَوْلَآ أَخَّرْتَنِىٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ قَرِيبٍ فَأَصَّدَّقَ وَأَكُن مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: And spend of what Allah has granted you by way of sustenance before death should come to any of you and he should say: “Lord, why did You not defer my return for a while so that I might give alms and be among the righteous?”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: But when a person's term comes to an end, Allah never grants any respite. Allah is well aware of all that you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: All that is in the heavens and all that is in the earth extols Allah's glory. 1 His is the sovereignty 2 and to Him is all praise due; 3 He has power over everything. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: He it is Who has created you: and among you are those that deny the Truth 1 and among you are those that believe in it. 2 Allah observes all that you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ صُوَرَكُمْ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: He created the heavens and the earth with Truth and shaped you, giving you excellent shapes. And to Him is your ultimate return. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: He knows what is in the heavens and the earth, and knows what you conceal and what you disclose. 1 Allah even knows what lies hidden in the breasts of people. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ فَذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Has the news of the unbelievers of the past not reached you? (They disbelieved) and then tasted its evil consequence. A grievous chastisement awaits them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُۥ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرٌ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا۟ وَتَوَلَّوا۟ ۚ وَّٱسْتَغْنَى ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ
verses.text: This was because their Messengers would come to them with Clear Signs, 1 but they would say: “Shall mortals (like ourselves) guide us to the Right Way?” 2 They rejected the Truth and turned away. Thereupon Allah became unconcerned with them, for Allah is Self-Sufficient, Innately Praiseworthy. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: زَعَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَن لَّن يُبْعَثُوا۟ ۚ قُلْ بَلَىٰ وَرَبِّى لَتُبْعَثُنَّ ثُمَّ لَتُنَبَّؤُنَّ بِمَا عَمِلْتُمْ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: The unbelievers have vehemently contended that they shall not be raised to life. 1 Say to them: “Yes, by my Lord, you shall surely be raised to life, 2 and you shall certainly be fully informed of all that you did. 3 That is easy enough for Allah.” 4

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـَٔامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَٱلنُّورِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلْنَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: So believe in Allah and in His Messenger and in the Light that We have sent down. 1 Allah is fully aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْجَمْعِ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلتَّغَابُنِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: (You shall come to know that) when He will assemble you on the Day of Gathering. 1 That shall be the Day (to determine) mutual gains and losses. 2 Whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously, 3 Allah will have his evil deeds expunged and will admit him to Gardens beneath which rivers flow. Therein they shall abide forever. That is the supreme triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: As for those who disbelieved and gave the lie to Our Signs: 1 they shall be the inmates of the Fire, and will abide in it. That is a woeful resort!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ يَهْدِ قَلْبَهُۥ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: No misfortune 1 ever befalls unless it be by Allah's leave. 2 And whosoever has faith in Allah, Allah directs his heart along the Right Path. 3 Allah has knowledge of everything. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۚ فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَىٰ رَسُولِنَا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Obey Allah and obey the Messenger. But if you turn away from obedience, (then know that) Our Messenger has no other duty than to clearly convey the Truth. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Allah there is no god but He; in Allah should the believers put all their trust. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدِكُمْ عَدُوًّا لَّكُمْ فَٱحْذَرُوهُمْ ۚ وَإِن تَعْفُوا۟ وَتَصْفَحُوا۟ وَتَغْفِرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Believers, there are enemies to you from among your spouses and your off-spring, so beware of them. But if you forgive and overlook their offences and pardon them, then surely Allah is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Your possessions and your offspring are nothing but a trial for you. And there awaits a great reward 1 for you with Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّأَنفُسِكُمْ ۗ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: So hold Allah in awe as much as you can, 1 and listen and obey, and be charitable. This is for your own good. And whoever remains safe from his own greediness, it is such that will prosper. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تُقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعِفْهُ لَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ شَكُورٌ حَلِيمٌ
verses.text: If you give Allah a goodly loan, He will increase it for you several fold 1 and will forgive you. Allah is Most Appreciative, Most Forbearing. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: He knows that which is beyond the ken of perception as well as that which can be perceived. He is the Most Mighty, the Most Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فَطَلِّقُوهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَأَحْصُوا۟ ٱلْعِدَّةَ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ ۖ لَا تُخْرِجُوهُنَّ مِنۢ بُيُوتِهِنَّ وَلَا يَخْرُجْنَ إِلَّآ أَن يَأْتِينَ بِفَـٰحِشَةٍ مُّبَيِّنَةٍ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَعَدَّ حُدُودَ ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ ظَلَمَ نَفْسَهُۥ ۚ لَا تَدْرِى لَعَلَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْدِثُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرًا
verses.text: O Prophet, when you divorce women, divorce them for their waiting-period, 1 and compute the waiting period accurately, 2 and hold Allah, your Lord, in awe. Do not turn them out of their homes (during the waiting period) – nor should they go away (from their homes) 3 – unless they have committed a manifestly evil deed. 4 Such are the bounds set by Allah; and he who transgresses the bounds set by Allah commits a wrong against himself. You do not know: maybe Allah will cause something to happen to pave the way (for reconciliation). 5

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا بَلَغْنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ أَوْ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ وَأَشْهِدُوا۟ ذَوَىْ عَدْلٍ مِّنكُمْ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَـٰدَةَ لِلَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ يُوعَظُ بِهِۦ مَن كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مَخْرَجًا
verses.text: And when they reach the end of their term (of waiting), then either honourably retain them (in the bond of wedlock) or honourably part with them, 1 and call two persons of known probity as witnesses from among yourselves, 2 and (let these witnesses) give upright testimony for the sake of Allah. That is to what all those that believe in Allah and the Last Day are exhorted. 3 Allah will find a way out for him who fears Allah, 4

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدْرًا
verses.text: and will provide him sustenance from whence he never even imagined. 1 Whoever puts his trust in Allah, He shall suffice him. Surely Allah brings about what He decrees; 2 Allah has set a measure for everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى يَئِسْنَ مِنَ ٱلْمَحِيضِ مِن نِّسَآئِكُمْ إِنِ ٱرْتَبْتُمْ فَعِدَّتُهُنَّ ثَلَـٰثَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى لَمْ يَحِضْنَ ۚ وَأُو۟لَـٰتُ ٱلْأَحْمَالِ أَجَلُهُنَّ أَن يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ يُسْرًا
verses.text: The waiting period of those of your women who have lost all expectation of menstruation shall be three months 1 in case you entertain any doubt; and the same shall apply to those who have not yet menstruated. 2 As for pregnant women, their waiting period shall be until the delivery of their burden. 3 Allah will create ease for him who fears Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَنزَلَهُۥٓ إِلَيْكُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُعْظِمْ لَهُۥٓ أَجْرًا
verses.text: This is the commandment of Allah that He has revealed to you. Whoever fears Allah, He will expunge his evil deeds and will richly reward him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ سَكَنتُم مِّن وُجْدِكُمْ وَلَا تُضَآرُّوهُنَّ لِتُضَيِّقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ ۚ وَإِن كُنَّ أُو۟لَـٰتِ حَمْلٍ فَأَنفِقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ حَتَّىٰ يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ ۚ فَإِنْ أَرْضَعْنَ لَكُمْ فَـَٔاتُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ ۖ وَأْتَمِرُوا۟ بَيْنَكُم بِمَعْرُوفٍ ۖ وَإِن تَعَاسَرْتُمْ فَسَتُرْضِعُ لَهُۥٓ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: (During the waiting period) lodge them according to your means wherever you dwell, and do not harass them to make them miserable. 1 And if they are pregnant, provide for them maintenance until they have delivered their burden. 2 And if they suckle your offspring whom they bore you, then give them due recompense, and graciously settle the question of compensation between yourselves by mutual understanding. 3 But if you experience difficulty (in determining the compensation for suckling) then let another woman suckle the child. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
verses.text: Whoever has abundant means, let him spend according to his means; and he whose means are straitened, let him spend out of what Allah has given him. Allah does not burden any human being beyond the means that He has bestowed upon him. Possibly Allah will grant ease after hardship.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرْيَةٍ عَتَتْ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهَا وَرُسُلِهِۦ فَحَاسَبْنَـٰهَا حِسَابًا شَدِيدًا وَعَذَّبْنَـٰهَا عَذَابًا نُّكْرًا
verses.text: How many towns 1 rebelled against the commandment of their Lord and His Messengers. Then We called them to a stern accounting, and subjected them to a harrowing chastisement.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
verses.text: So they tasted the evil fruit of their deeds; and the fruit of their deeds was utter loss.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ يَـٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ۚ قَدْ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَيْكُمْ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: Allah has laid in store for them a grievous chastisement. So fear Allah, O people of understanding who have attained to faith. Allah has sent down to you an Exhortation,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّسُولًا يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ مُبَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا يُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ قَدْ أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزْقًا
verses.text: a Messenger 1 who rehearses to you Allah's verses that clearly expound the Guidance so that He may bring out those that believe and act righteously, from every kind of darkness into light. 2 He will admit whosoever believes in Allah and acts righteously to Gardens beneath which rivers flow. They shall abide in them forever. For such has Allah made an excellent provision.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ وَمِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ ٱلْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۢا
verses.text: Allah it is He Who created seven heavens, and, like them, the earth. 1 His commandment descends among them. (All this is being stated so that you know) that Allah has power over everything, and that Allah encompasses all things in His knowledge.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَآ أَحَلَّ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ۖ تَبْتَغِى مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَٰجِكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O Prophet, why do you forbid what Allah has made lawful for you? 1 Is it to please your wives? 2 Allah is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ فَرَضَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَـٰنِكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Allah has prescribed for you a way for the absolution of your oaths. 1 Allah is your Guardian. He is All-Knowing, Most Wise. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ أَسَرَّ ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِلَىٰ بَعْضِ أَزْوَٰجِهِۦ حَدِيثًا فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَتْ بِهِۦ وَأَظْهَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرَّفَ بَعْضَهُۥ وَأَعْرَضَ عَنۢ بَعْضٍ ۖ فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَهَا بِهِۦ قَالَتْ مَنْ أَنۢبَأَكَ هَـٰذَا ۖ قَالَ نَبَّأَنِىَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: The Prophet confided something to one of his wives and then she disclosed it (to another); so after Allah revealed to the Prophet (that she had disclosed that secret), he made a part of it known to her and passed over a part of it. And when he told her about this (i.e., that she had disclosed the secret entrusted to her), she asked: “Who informed you of this?” He said: “I was told of it by He Who is All-Knowing, All-Aware.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَـٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَـٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
verses.text: If the two of you turn in repentance to Allah (that is better for you), for the hearts of both of you have swerved from the Straight Path. 1 But if you support one another against the Prophet, 2 then surely Allah is his Protector; and after that Gabriel and all righteous believers and the angels are all his supporters. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّهُۥٓ إِن طَلَّقَكُنَّ أَن يُبْدِلَهُۥٓ أَزْوَٰجًا خَيْرًا مِّنكُنَّ مُسْلِمَـٰتٍ مُّؤْمِنَـٰتٍ قَـٰنِتَـٰتٍ تَـٰٓئِبَـٰتٍ عَـٰبِدَٰتٍ سَـٰٓئِحَـٰتٍ ثَيِّبَـٰتٍ وَأَبْكَارًا
verses.text: Maybe if he were to divorce you, your Lord might grant him in exchange wives better than you 1 – those who truly submit to Allah, 2 are full of faith, obedient, 3 disposed to repentance, 4 and given to worship 5 and fasting 6 – both previously wedded ones and virgins.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.text: Believers, guard yourselves and your kindred against a Fire whose fuel is human beings and stones, 1 a Fire held in the charge of fierce and stern angels who never disobey what He has commanded them, and always do what they are bidden. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: (It will then be said): “Unbelievers, make no excuses today. You are being recompensed for nothing else but your deeds.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمْ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمْ وَيُدْخِلَكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ يَوْمَ لَا يُخْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّبِىَّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ ۖ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَىٰ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَـٰنِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Believers, turn to Allah in sincere repentance; 1 maybe your Lord will expunge your evil deeds and admit you to the Gardens beneath which rivers flow. 2 This will be on the Day when Allah will not disgrace the Prophet and those who have embraced faith and are with him; 3 their light will be running before them and on their right hands, and they will say: “Our Lord, perfect for us our light and forgive us. Surely You have power over everything.” 4

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ جَـٰهِدِ ٱلْكُفَّارَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ وَٱغْلُظْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ وَمَأْوَىٰهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: O Prophet, strive against the unbelievers and the hypocrites, and be severe with them. 1 Hell shall be their resort. What a grievous end!

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ نُوحٍ وَٱمْرَأَتَ لُوطٍ ۖ كَانَتَا تَحْتَ عَبْدَيْنِ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا صَـٰلِحَيْنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمَا مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا وَقِيلَ ٱدْخُلَا ٱلنَّارَ مَعَ ٱلدَّٰخِلِينَ
verses.text: Allah has set forth for the unbelievers the parable of the wives of Noah and Lot. They were wedded to two of Our righteous servants, but each acted treacherously with her husband, 1 and their husbands could be of no avail to them against Allah. The two of them were told: “Enter the Fire with all the others who enter it.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ فِرْعَوْنَ إِذْ قَالَتْ رَبِّ ٱبْنِ لِى عِندَكَ بَيْتًا فِى ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِى مِن فِرْعَوْنَ وَعَمَلِهِۦ وَنَجِّنِى مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Allah has set forth for the believers the parable of Pharaoh's wife. She prayed: “My Lord, build for me a house with You in Paradise and deliver me from Pharaoh and his misdeeds; 1 and deliver me from the iniquitous people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَرْيَمَ ٱبْنَتَ عِمْرَٰنَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَـٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِۦ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِتِينَ
verses.text: Allah has also set forth the parable of Mary, the daughter of Imran, 1 who guarded her chastity, 2 and into whom We breathed of Our Spirit, 3 and who testified to the words of her Lord and His Books. She was among the obedient. 4

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Blessed is He 1 in Whose Hand is the dominion of the Universe, 2 and Who has power over everything; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.text: Who created death and life that He might try you as to which of you is better in deed. 1 He is the Most Mighty, the Most Forgiving; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِن تَفَـٰوُتٍ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ
verses.text: Who created the seven heavens one upon another. 1 You will see no incongruity in the Merciful One's creation. 2 Turn your vision again, can you see any flaw? 3

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ
verses.text: Then turn your vision again, and then again; in the end your vision will come back to you, worn out and frustrated.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِمَصَـٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَـٰهَا رُجُومًا لِّلشَّيَـٰطِينِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: We have adorned the lower heaven 1 with lamps, 2 and have made them a means to drive away the satans. 3 We have prepared for them the chastisement of the Blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: The chastisement of Hell awaits those who disbelieve in their Lord. 1 What a wretched destination!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.text: When they will be cast into it, they will hear it roar as it boils, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
verses.text: as though it will burst with rage. Every time a multitude is cast into it, its keepers will ask them: “Did no warner come to you?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ
verses.text: They will say: “Yes, a warner came to us, but we gave the lie to him and said: 'Allah has revealed nothing. You are surely in huge error.' 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ كُنَّا نَسْمَعُ أَوْ نَعْقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِىٓ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: They will say: 'If we had only listened and understood, 1 we would not be among the inmates of the Blazing Fire.'”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسُحْقًا لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: Thus will they confess their sins. 1 Damned are these inmates of the Blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Surely forgiveness and a mighty reward 1 await those who fear Allah without seeing Him. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَسِرُّوا۟ قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ ٱجْهَرُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: Whether you speak in secrecy or aloud, (it is all the same to Allah). He even knows the secrets that lie hidden in the breasts of people. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: Would He not know, He Who has created, 1 when He is All-Subtle, 2 All-Aware?

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.text: He it is Who made the earth subservient to you. So traverse in its tracks and partake of the sustenance 1 He has provided. To Him will you be resurrected. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ
verses.text: Do you feel secure that He Who is in the heaven 1 will not cause the earth to cave in with you, and then suddenly it will begin to rock violently?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.text: Do you feel secure that He Who is in the heaven will not let loose upon you a storm of stones? 1 Then shall you know what My warning is like! 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.text: Those who came before them also gave the lie (to the Messengers): then how awesome was My chastisement! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Have they not seen birds above them spreading and closing their wings, with none holding them except the Merciful One? 1 He oversees everything. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ جُندٌ لَّكُمْ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۚ إِنِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِى غُرُورٍ
verses.text: Which is your army that will come to your aid against the Merciful Lord? 1 But the unbelievers are in utter delusion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.text: Who shall provide for you if He withholds His sustenance? Nay; but they persist in rebellion and aversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.text: Who is better guided: he who walks grovelling on his face, 1 or he who walks upright on a Straight Path?

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Say: “He it is Who has brought you into being, and has given you hearing and sight, and has given you hearts to think and understand. How seldom do you give thanks!” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: Say: “Allah it is Who multiplied you in the earth and to Him you will be mustered.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They say: “If you are truthful, tell us when will this promise (of the Hereafter) be fulfilled?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Say: “Allah alone knows about that; and I am no more than a plain warner.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ زُلْفَةً سِيٓـَٔتْ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَقِيلَ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: When they will see it near at hand, the faces of all those who had denied it will be distraught, 1 and then they will be told: “This is the doom which you used to ask for.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَهْلَكَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِىَ أَوْ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Say to them: “Did you ever consider: whether Allah destroys me and those that are with me, or shows mercy to us, who can protect the unbelievers from a grievous chastisement?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Say to them: “He is Merciful, and it is in Him that we believe, and it is in Him that we put all our trust. 1 Soon will you know who is in manifest error.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: Say to them: “Did you even consider: if all the water that you have (in the wells) were to sink down into the depths of the earth, who will produce for you clear, flowing water?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.text: Nun. By the pen and what the scribes write. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: By your Lord's Grace, you are not afflicted with madness, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.text: and surely yours shall be a never-ending reward, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: and you are certainly on the most exalted standard of moral excellence. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: So you will soon see, and they too will see,

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
verses.text: which of you is afflicted with madness.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.text: Surely your Lord knows well those who have strayed from His Way just as He knows well those who are on the Right Way.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Do not, then, yield to those who reject the Truth, decrying it as false;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ
verses.text: they would wish you to be pliant so that they too may be pliant. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.text: And do not yield to any contemptible swearer, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ
verses.text: the fault-finder who goes around slandering,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: the hinderer of good, 1 the transgressor, the sinful; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.text: the coarse-grained, and above all mean and ignoble; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.text: (who so acts) simply because he has wealth and sons, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: and whenever Our verses are rehearsed to him, he says: “These are fairy- tales of times gone by.”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ
verses.text: Soon shall We brand him on his snout. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: We have put them [i.e., the Makkans] to test even as We put to test the owners of the orchard 1 when they vowed that they would gather the fruit of their orchard in the morning,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْتَثْنُونَ
verses.text: without making any allowance (for the will of Allah). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: Thereupon a calamity from your Lord passed over it while they were asleep,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.text: and so by morning the orchard lay as though it had been fully harvested.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: At daybreak they called out to one another:

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
verses.text: “Hurry to your orchard 1 if you would gather its fruit.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ
verses.text: So off they went, whispering to one another:

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
verses.text: “No destitute person shall enter it today.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ
verses.text: They went forth early, believing that they had the power (to gather the fruit). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: But as soon as they beheld the orchard, (they cried out): “We have certainly lost the way;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.text: rather, we are utterly ruined.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: The best among them said: “Did I not say to you: why do you not give glory to (your Lord)?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: They cried out: “Glory be to our Lord! Certainly we were sinners.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَلَـٰوَمُونَ
verses.text: Then they began to reproach one another. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.text: They said: “Woe to us! We had indeed transgressed.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.text: Maybe our Lord will give us a better orchard in its place; to our Lord do we penitently turn.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Such is the chastisement; and the chastisement of the Hereafter is assuredly even greater, if only they knew.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Surely 1 the God-fearing shall have Gardens of bliss with their Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: What! Shall We treat those who have submitted (to Our command) like those who have acted as criminals?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: What is the matter with you? How ill do you judge! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ
verses.text: Or do you have a Book 1 wherein you read

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.text: that (in the Hereafter) you shall have all that you choose for yourselves?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَـٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَـٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: Or have We sworn a covenant with you which We are bound to keep till the Day of Resurrection, (a covenant requiring that whatever you ordain for yourselves shall be yours)?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.text: Ask them: “Which of them can guarantee that? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or has something been guaranteed by any of those whom they associate with Allah in His Divinity?” If so, let them bring forth their associates, if they are truthful. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when the dreadful calamity will unfold, 1 when people will be summoned to prostrate themselves, and yet they will not be able to prostrate.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: Their eyes shall be downcast and ignominy shall overwhelm them. For when they were safe and sound, they were summoned to prostrate themselves, (and they refused). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So leave Me, (O Prophet), to deal with him who gives the lie to this Discourse. 1 We shall draw them little by little (to their undoing) in a way that they will not know. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
verses.text: I am giving them a respite. Great is My scheme! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or are you asking them for some compensation so that they feel burdened with debt? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have any knowledge of the Unseen which they are now writing down? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
verses.text: So bear with patience until the Judgement of your Lord 1 comes, and do not belike the man in the fish (i.e., Jonah) 2 who called out, choking with grief: 3

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
verses.text: had his Lord not bestowed His favour upon him, he would have been cast upon that barren shore (and would have remained there) in disgrace. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: But his Lord exalted him, and included him among His righteous servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: When the unbelievers hear this Exhortation, they look at you as though they would knock you off your feet with their (hostile) glances. 1 They say: “Surely he is afflicted with madness”;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: although this is nothing but an Exhortation (to goodness) for everyone in the world.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: The indubitable event! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: And what is that indubitable event?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: And what do you know what that indubitable event is? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
verses.text: The Thamud 1 and the Ad denied the (possibility of a) sudden calamity, 2 calling it false.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
verses.text: Then the Thamud were destroyed by an awesome upheaval; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
verses.text: and the Ad were destroyed by a furiously raging wind-storm

verses.arabicUthmani: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
verses.text: which He let loose upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession; so that (if you had been there) you might have seen people lying prostrate, as though they were uprooted trunks of hollowed palm trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
verses.text: Do you now see any trace of them?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
verses.text: Pharaoh and those before him and the people of the overturned habitations 1 all engaged in the same great sin.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
verses.text: They did not follow the Messenger of their Lord, and so He seized them with a severe grip.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.text: Verily when the water rose to great heights, 1 We bore you upon a floating vessel (i.e. the Ark) 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
verses.text: so that We might make it an instructive event for you, and retentive ears might preserve its memory. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.text: So 1 when the Trumpet is blown with a single blast

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
verses.text: and the earth and the mountains are carried aloft and are crushed to bits at one stroke,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: on that Day shall that indubitable event come to pass;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
verses.text: when the sky will be rent asunder, the grip holding it together having loosened on that Day,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
verses.text: and the angels will stand on the sides, with eight of them bearing aloft the Throne 1 of your Lord on that Day.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
verses.text: That will be the Day when you shall be brought forth (before Allah) and no secret of yours shall remain hidden.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: On that Day, he whose Record is given to him in his right hand 1 will say: “Lo! Read my Record! 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: Verily I was sure that I would be handed over my account.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.text: Then he shall find himself in a life of bliss;

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
verses.text: in a lofty Garden

verses.arabicUthmani: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
verses.text: the clusters of whose fruit will be hanging low to be within reach (of the inmates of Paradise).

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
verses.text: (They will be told): “Eat and drink with good cheer as a reward for the good deeds you did in the days that have passed by.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: As for him whose Record will be given to him in his left hand, 1 he will exclaim: “Would that I had never been given my Record, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: and had not known my account. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.text: Oh! Would that the death that came to me in the world had made an end of me! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ ۜ
verses.text: My riches have not availed me,

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ
verses.text: and my authority has vanished.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.text: (A command will be issued): “Seize him and shackle him,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.text: then cast him in the Fire,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.text: then fasten him with a chain, seventy cubits long.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: He would not believe in Allah, the Most Great;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: nor would he urge the feeding of the poor. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
verses.text: Today he has been left here friendless;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ
verses.text: and has no food except the filth from the washing of wounds,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.text: which only the sinners will eat.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: But no; 1 I swear by what you see,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and by what you do not see,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: that this is the speech of an honourable Messenger, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: not the speech of a poet. Little do you believe! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Nor is this the speech of a soothsayer. Little do you reflect!

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It has been revealed by the Lord of the Universe. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.text: And if he [i.e., the Prophets] had forged this Discourse and thereafter ascribed it to Us,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: We would surely have seized him by the right hand,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ
verses.text: and then severed his life vein;

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
verses.text: and not one of you would have been able to withhold Us from doing so. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Surely it is a Good Counsel for the God-fearing. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: We certainly know that some among you will give the lie to it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسْرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: and surely it will be a cause of regret for the unbelievers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: Certainly it is a Truth of absolute certainty.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So glorify the name of your Lord Most Great.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأَلَ سَآئِلٌۢ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ
verses.text: A beseecher besought the visitation of chastisement, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٌ
verses.text: (a chastisement meant) for the unbelievers, one which none can avert;

verses.arabicUthmani: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ
verses.text: a chastisement from Allah, the Lord of the ascending steps, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
verses.text: by which the angels and the Spirit 1 ascend to Him 2 in one Day the duration of which is fifty thousand years. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.text: So, (O Prophet), persevere with gracious perseverance. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا
verses.text: Verily they think that the chastisement is far off,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَرَىٰهُ قَرِيبًا
verses.text: while We think that it is near at hand. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلْمُهْلِ
verses.text: It shall befall on a Day 1 whereon the sky will become like molten brass, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ
verses.text: and the mountains will become like dyed tufts of wool, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا
verses.text: and no bosom friend will enquire about any of his bosom friends

verses.arabicUthmani: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
verses.text: although they shall be within sight of one another. 1 The guilty one would fain ransom himself from the torment of that Day by offering his children,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ
verses.text: and his spouse and his brother,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُـْٔوِيهِ
verses.text: and his kinsfolk who had stood by him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.text: and all persons of the earth, if only he could thus save himself.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.text: By no means! It will be the fierce flame

verses.arabicUthmani: نَزَّاعَةً لِّلشَّوَىٰ
verses.text: that will strip off the scalp.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: It shall insistently summon him who turned his back and retreated,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ
verses.text: and amassed wealth and covetously hoarded it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.text: Verily man is impatient by nature: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا
verses.text: bewailing when evil befalls him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا
verses.text: and tight-fisted when good fortune visits him,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: except those that pray, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: and are constant in their Prayer; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: and those in whose wealth there is a known right

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: for those that ask and those that are dispossessed, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: those who firmly believe in the Day of Recompense, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
verses.text: and fear the chastisement of their Lord 1 –

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمْ غَيْرُ مَأْمُونٍ
verses.text: surely the chastisement of their Lord is a thing none can feel secure from –

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
verses.text: and those who guard their private parts, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
verses.text: except in regard to their spouses and those whom their right hands possess, for in regard to them they are not reproachable, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
verses.text: but any who seeks to go beyond that, it is indeed they who are the transgressors,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ
verses.text: and those who fulfil their trusts and their covenants, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَـٰدَٰتِهِمْ قَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: and those who are upright in their testimonies; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
verses.text: and who take due care of their Prayer: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ مُّكْرَمُونَ
verses.text: all these shall live honourably in the Gardens.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ قِبَلَكَ مُهْطِعِينَ
verses.text: But what is the matter with the unbelievers who are hurrying towards you

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ
verses.text: in crowds, both on the right and on the left? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Does everyone of them wish to enter the Garden of Bliss? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: By no means! They know that which We have created them from. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.text: I swear 1 by the Lord of the easts and the wests 2 that We have the power

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.text: to replace them by others who would be better than they; and We shall certainly not be overpowered. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: So leave them to engage in vain talk and to amuse themselves until they come face to face with the Day which they are promised,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
verses.text: the Day on which they will hastily come forth from their graves, as though they were hurrying on to the altars of their deities. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: Their eyes will be downcast and disgrace will overwhelm them. Such is the Day that they were promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرْ قَوْمَكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: We sent Noah to his people (and directed him): “Warn your people before a grievous chastisement 1 comes upon them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Noah said: “My people, I have certainly been sent as a clear warner to you,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: that you serve Allah and fear Him, and follow me; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: He will forgive your sins 1 and will grant you respite until an appointed term. 2 Indeed when Allah's appointed term comes, it cannot be deferred; 3 if you only knew!” 4

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
verses.text: He said: 1 “My Lord, I called my people by night and by day,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا
verses.text: but the more I called, the farther they fled. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
verses.text: And every time I called them so that You might forgive them, 1 they thrust their fingers into their ears and wrapped up their faces with their garments 2 and obstinately clung to their attitude, and waxed very proud. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُهُمْ جِهَارًا
verses.text: Then I summoned them openly,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا
verses.text: and preached to them in public, and also addressed them in secret.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
verses.text: I said to them: “Ask forgiveness from your Lord; surely He is Most Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا
verses.text: He will shower upon you torrents from heaven,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَـٰرًا
verses.text: and will provide you with wealth and children, and will bestow upon you gardens and rivers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
verses.text: What is amiss with you that you do not look forward to the majesty of Allah 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا
verses.text: when He has created you in stages? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
verses.text: Do you not see how Allah has created seven heavens, one upon the other,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا
verses.text: and has placed the moon in them as a light, and the sun as a radiant lamp?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
verses.text: And Allah has caused you to grow out of the earth so wondrously, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا
verses.text: and He will later cause you to return to it and will then again bring you out of it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
verses.text: Allah has made the earth a wide expanse for you

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا
verses.text: so that you may tread its spacious paths.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمْ عَصَوْنِى وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَن لَّمْ يَزِدْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارًا
verses.text: Noah said: “My Lord, they did not pay heed to what I said, and followed those (nobles) whose possession of wealth and children has led them to an even greater loss.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا
verses.text: They contrived a plot of great magnitude. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا
verses.text: They said: “Do not abandon your deities; do not abandon Wadd, nor Suwa, nor Yaghuth, nor Yauq, nor Nasr. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا
verses.text: They have misled many. So do not enable these evildoers to increase in anything except straying (from the Right Way).” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
verses.text: And so they were drowned on account of their sins, and then cast into the Fire, 1 and did not find any other than Allah, 2 to come forth to their help.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ نُوحٌ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرْ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
