verses.text: Noah said: “My Lord, do not leave out of these unbelievers even a single dweller on earth,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
verses.text: for certainly if You should leave them (alive), they will mislead Your servants, and will beget none but sinners and utter unbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا
verses.text: My Lord, forgive me and my parents, and whoever enters my house as a believer, and forgive all believers, both men and women, and do not increase the wrong-doers in anything except perdition.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًا
verses.text: Say, (O Prophet), it was revealed to me that a band of jinn attentively listened 1 to (the recitation of the Qur'an) and then (went back to their people) and said:

verses.arabicUthmani: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
verses.text: “We have indeed heard a wonderful Qur'an 1 which guides to the Right Way; so we have come to believe in it, and we will not associate aught with Our Lord in His Divinity”; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَـٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَـٰحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
verses.text: and that “He – exalted be His Majesty – has not taken to Himself either a wife or a son”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا
verses.text: and that “the foolish among us 1 have been wont to say outrageous things about Allah”;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا
verses.text: and that “we had thought that men and jinn would never speak a lie about Allah”, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا
verses.text: and that “some from among the humans used to seek protection of some among the jinn, and thus they increased the arrogance 1 of the jinn”;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا
verses.text: and that “they thought, even as you thought, that Allah would never raise anyone (as a Messenger)”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَـٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا
verses.text: and that “we tried to pry (the secrets of) the heaven, but we found it full of terrible guards and shooting meteors”;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَـٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْـَٔانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا
verses.text: and that “we would take up stations in the heaven to try to hear but anyone who now attempts to listen finds a shooting meteor in wait for him”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
verses.text: and that “we do not know whether evil is intended for those on the earth, or whether their Lord intends to direct them to the Right Way”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا
verses.text: and that “some of us are upright and some of us are otherwise for we follow widely divergent paths”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
verses.text: and that “we thought that we will neither be able to frustrate Allah on earth, nor frustrate Him by flight”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
verses.text: and that “when we heard the teaching of the Right Way we came to believe in it; he who believes in His Lord shall have no fear of suffering loss or being subjected to any injustice”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
verses.text: and that “among us some are Muslims (Those who have submitted to Allah), and some of us are deviant. So those who became Muslims found the Right Course;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
verses.text: but those who deviated from the Truth, will be the fuel for Hell.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
verses.text: If 1 people were to keep firmly to the Right Way, We would have vouchsafed them abundant rain 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
verses.text: so that We might try them through this bounty. 1 Whoso turns away from the remembrance of his Lord, 2 He will cause him to suffer a grievous chastisement;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
verses.text: and that “mosques belong to Allah, so do not invoke anyone with Him”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
verses.text: and when Allah's servant 1 stood up to call on Him, they well-nigh swarmed him.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.text: Say, (O Prophet): “I call on my Lord alone, and I do not associate aught with Him in His Divinity.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا
verses.text: Say: “Surely neither it is in my power to hurt you nor to bring you to the Right Way.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
verses.text: Say: “None can protect me from Allah, nor can I find a refuge apart from Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
verses.text: (My task is no more than) to deliver Allah's proclamation and His messages. 1 And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger, surely the Fire of Hell awaits him; therein he will abide in perpetuity.” 2

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
verses.text: (They shall not change their ways) until they see that against which they had been warned, and then they will know whose helpers are weaker and whose supporters are fewer in number. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
verses.text: Say: “I know not whether what you are promised is near or whether my Lord will prolong its term. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
verses.text: He is the Knower of the Unseen, and He does not disclose His Unseen to anyone 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا
verses.text: other than to a Messenger whom He chooses 1 (for the bestowal of any part of the knowledge of the Unseen), whereafter He appoints guards who go before him and behind him, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
verses.text: so that He may know that they have delivered the messages of their Lord. 1 He encompasses in His knowledge their surroundings and keeps a count of all things.” 2

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ
verses.text: O you the (sleeping) enwrapped one! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا
verses.text: Stand up in Prayer by night, all but a small part of it; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا
verses.text: half of it, or reduce it a little;

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.text: or add to it a little; 1 and recite the Qur'an slowly and distinctly. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا
verses.text: Behold, We shall cast upon you a Weighty Word. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
verses.text: Surely getting up at night 1 is the best means of subduing the self 2 and is more suitable for uprightness in speech. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا
verses.text: You are indeed much occupied during the day with the affairs of the world.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
verses.text: So remember the name of your Lord 1 and devote yourself to Him with exclusive devotion.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
verses.text: He is the Lord of the East and the West; there is no god but He. So take Him alone for your Guardian, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.text: And bear patiently the vain things they utter, and gracefully 1 forsake them.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا
verses.text: Leave it to Me to deal with the affluent ones who give the lie 1 (to the Truth), and bear with them for a while.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
verses.text: We have heavy fetters 1 and a blazing Fire in store for them;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطَعَامًا ذَا غُصَّةٍ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: and a food that chokes, and a grievous chastisement.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَثِيبًا مَّهِيلًا
verses.text: (They will come across all this) on the Day when the earth and the mountains shall tremble violently and the mountains shall crumble into heaps of scattered sand. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا شَـٰهِدًا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ رَسُولًا
verses.text: Surely 1 We have sent to you a Messenger as a witness over you, 2 just as We had sent a Messenger to Pharaoh.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَصَىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ أَخْذًا وَبِيلًا
verses.text: But Pharaoh disobeyed Our Messenger, so We seized him with a terrible seizing.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
verses.text: If you persist in disbelieving, how will you guard yourself against the (woe of the) Day that will turn children grey-haired, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا
verses.text: the Day whose severity shall cause the heaven to split asunder? Allah's promise is ever bound to be fulfilled.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Indeed this is nothing but a Good Counsel; so let him who will take a way leading to his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَىِ ٱلَّيْلِ وَنِصْفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةٌ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحْصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ ۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرْضَىٰ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضْرِبُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ يَبْتَغُونَ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَٱقْرَءُوا۟ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنْهُ ۚ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا ۚ وَٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌۢ
verses.text: (O Prophet), 1 your Lord knows that you sometimes stand up in Prayer nearly two-thirds of the night, and sometimes half or one-third of it, 2 and so does a party of those with you; 3 Allah measures the night and the day. He knows that you cannot keep an accurate count of it, so He has shown mercy to you. So now recite as much of the Qur'an as you can. 4 He knows that there are among you those who are sick and others who are journeying in the land in quest of Allah's bounty, 5 and still others who are fighting in the cause of Allah. 6 So recite as much of the Qur'an as you easily can, and establish Prayer, and pay Zakah, 7 and give Allah a goodly loan. 8 Whatever good you send forth for yourselves, you shall find it with Allah. That is better and its reward is greater. 9 And ask for Allah's forgiveness; surely He is Most Forgiving, Most Compassionate.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ
verses.text: O you enveloped in your cloak! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُمْ فَأَنذِرْ
verses.text: Arise, and warn, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ
verses.text: and magnify the glory of your Lord, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ
verses.text: and purify your robes, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلرُّجْزَ فَٱهْجُرْ
verses.text: and shun uncleanness, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ
verses.text: and bestow not favour in order to seek from others a greater return, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصْبِرْ
verses.text: and persevere for your Lord's sake. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِى ٱلنَّاقُورِ
verses.text: When the Trumpet shall be sounded,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ
verses.text: that will surely be a hard day, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ غَيْرُ يَسِيرٍ
verses.text: not an easy day for the unbelievers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًا
verses.text: Leave Me with him 1 whom I alone have created, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالًا مَّمْدُودًا
verses.text: whom I have endowed with abundant riches,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًا
verses.text: and sons ever present with him, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًا
verses.text: and for whom I have smoothed the way (to power and riches),

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ
verses.text: and who still greedily desires that I should bestow upon him more. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا عَنِيدًا
verses.text: By no means; he is stubbornly opposed to Our Signs.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا
verses.text: I shall soon constrain him to a hard ascent.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ
verses.text: He reflected and then hatched a scheme.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.text: Ruin seize him, how did he hatch a scheme?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ
verses.text: Again, ruin seize him, how did he hatch a scheme?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ
verses.text: He looked (at others);

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ
verses.text: then frowned and scowled;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ
verses.text: then he retreated and waxed proud,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
verses.text: and said: “This (Qur'an) is merely a sorcery of yore;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: this is nothing but the word of a mere mortal!” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأُصْلِيهِ سَقَرَ
verses.text: Him shall I soon roast in Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ
verses.text: And what do you know what Hell is?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ
verses.text: It spares nothing; it leaves nothing intact; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوَّاحَةٌ لِّلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: it scorches (even) the skin. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ
verses.text: Over it are nineteen keepers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَـٰنًا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَـٰذَا مَثَلًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: We 1 have appointed none but angels as the keepers of the Fire, 2 and We have not made their number but as a trial for the unbelievers 3 so that those who have been endowed with the Book will be convinced 4 and the believers' faith will increase, 5 and neither those who have been endowed with the Book nor the believers will fall into any doubt. As for those in whose hearts there is a sickness 6 as well as the unbelievers, they will say: “What did Allah aim at by this strange parable?” 7 Thus does Allah let whomsoever He pleases to go astray, and directs whomsoever He pleases 8 to the Right Way. And none knows the hosts of your Lord but He. 9 (And Hell has only been mentioned here) that people may take heed. 10

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا وَٱلْقَمَرِ
verses.text: Nay, 1 by the moon,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذْ أَدْبَرَ
verses.text: and by the night when it recedes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ
verses.text: and by the day when it dawns (with its radiance),

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ
verses.text: surely (Hell) is one of the greatest Signs, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: نَذِيرًا لِّلْبَشَرِ
verses.text: a warning to humankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
verses.text: a warning to everyone of you whether he would like to come forward or lag behind. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ
verses.text: Each one is a hostage to one's deeds, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: save the People of the Right Hand

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: who shall be in the Gardens, 1 and shall ask

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: about the guilty ones: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ
verses.text: “What drove you to Hell?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: They will answer: “We were not among those who observed Prayer, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ
verses.text: and we did not feed the poor, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ
verses.text: and we indulged in vain talk with those who indulged in vain talk,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and we gave the lie to the Day of Judgement

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ
verses.text: until the inevitable event overtook us.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَـٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ
verses.text: The intercession of the intercessors shall then be of no avail to them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: What is the matter with people that they are turning away from this Exhortation,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌ
verses.text: as though they were frightened wild asses,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَّتْ مِن قَسْوَرَةٍۭ
verses.text: fleeing from a lion? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
verses.text: No indeed; each one of them desires that open letters be sent to each of them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
verses.text: No indeed; the truth is that they have no fear of the Hereafter. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.text: Nay; 1 this is an Exhortation.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So, whoever wills may benefit from it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
verses.text: But they will not benefit from it unless Allah Himself so wills. 1 He is worthy to be feared; 2 and He is worthy to forgive (those that fear Him). 3

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ
verses.text: Nay, 1 I swear by the Day of Resurrection;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
verses.text: and nay, I swear by the self-reproaching soul! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ
verses.text: Does man imagine that We will not be able to bring his bones together again? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ
verses.text: Yes indeed; We have the power to remould even his finger-tips. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ
verses.text: But man desires to persist in his evil ways. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ
verses.text: He asks: “When will the Day of Resurrection be?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا بَرِقَ ٱلْبَصَرُ
verses.text: When the sight is dazed, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَسَفَ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: and the moon is eclipsed,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: and the sun and the moon are joined together, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ
verses.text: on that Day will man say: “Whither the refuge?”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَا وَزَرَ
verses.text: No, there is no refuge.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ
verses.text: With your Lord alone will be the retreat that Day.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
verses.text: On that Day will man be apprised of his deeds, both the earlier and the later. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌ
verses.text: But lo, man is well aware of himself,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ
verses.text: even though he might make up excuses. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
verses.text: (O Prophet), 1 do not stir your tongue hastily (to commit the Revelation to memory).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ
verses.text: Surely it is for Us to have you commit it to memory and to recite it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا قَرَأْنَـٰهُ فَٱتَّبِعْ قُرْءَانَهُۥ
verses.text: And so when We recite it, 1 follow its recitation attentively;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ
verses.text: then it will be for Us to explain it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ
verses.text: Nay; 1 the truth is that you love ardently (the good of this world) that can be obtained hastily,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَذَرُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ
verses.text: and are oblivious of the Hereafter. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌ
verses.text: Some faces on that Day will be fresh and resplendent, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ
verses.text: and will be looking towards their Lord; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌ
verses.text: and some faces on that Day will be gloomy,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌ
verses.text: believing that a crushing calamity is about to strike them.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ
verses.text: Nay; 1 when a man's soul reaches up to the throat,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ مَنْ ۜ رَاقٍ
verses.text: and it is said: “Is there any enchanter who can step forward and help (by his chanting)?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ
verses.text: and he realises that the hour of parting is come,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ
verses.text: and calf is inter-twined with calf. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ
verses.text: On that Day you will be driven to your Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
verses.text: But he did not verify the Truth, nor did he observe Prayer;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَـٰكِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: on the contrary, he gave the lie to the Truth and turned his back upon it,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ
verses.text: then he went back to his kinsfolk, elated with pride. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰ
verses.text: This (attitude) is worthy of you, altogether worthy;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَوْلَىٰ لَكَ فَأَوْلَىٰٓ
verses.text: again, it is worthy of you, altogether worthy. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى
verses.text: Does man 1 think that he will be left alone, unquestioned? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ
verses.text: Was he not a drop of ejaculated semen,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.text: then he became a clot, and then Allah made it into a living body and proportioned its parts,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.text: and then He made of him a pair, male and female?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
verses.text: Does He, then, not have the power to bring back the dead to life? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا
verses.text: Was there a period of time when man was not even worthy of a mention? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَّبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ سَمِيعًۢا بَصِيرًا
verses.text: Verily We created man out of a drop of intermingled sperm 1 so that We might try him, 2 and We therefore endowed him with hearing and sight. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
verses.text: Surely We showed him the Right Path, regardless of whether he chooses to be thankful or unthankful 1 (to his Lord).

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
verses.text: For the unbelievers, We have kept ready chains and fetters and a Blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
verses.text: The virtuous 1 shall drink from a cup tempered with camphor water.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
verses.text: This will be a gushing spring 1 wherefrom Allah's servants 2 shall drink wine, a spring from which they will take out channels wherever they wish. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
verses.text: These will be the ones who fulfil their vows 1 and dread the Day whose woe shall be spread far and wide;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا
verses.text: those who, for the love of Him, 1 feed the needy, and the orphan, and the captive, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا
verses.text: (saying): 1 “We feed you only for Allah's sake; we do not seek of you any recompense or thanks, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
verses.text: we fear from our Lord a Day that shall be long and distressful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
verses.text: So Allah shall guard them against the woe of that Day, and will procure them freshness and joy, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا
verses.text: and will reward them for their steadfastness 1 with Paradise and robes of silk.

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ ۖ لَا يَرَوْنَ فِيهَا شَمْسًا وَلَا زَمْهَرِيرًا
verses.text: There they will recline on elevated couches and will be subjected neither to the burning heat of the sun nor to bitter cold.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا
verses.text: The shades of Paradise will bend over them, and its fruits will be brought within their easy reach;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠
verses.text: and there shall be passed around them vessels of silver 1 and goblets of crystal, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا
verses.text: goblets bright as crystal but made of silver, filled to exact measure. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
verses.text: Therein they shall be served a cup flavoured with ginger,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
verses.text: drawn from a spring (in Paradise) called Salsabil. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا
verses.text: There boys of everlasting youth shall go about attending them: when you see them, you would think that they are scattered pearls. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: Whitherto you look around, you will see an abundance of bliss and the glories of a great kingdom. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
verses.text: They [i.e., the virtuous] shall be attired in garments of fine green silk and rich brocade 1 and will be adorned with bracelets of silver. 2 Their Lord will give them a pure wine to drink. 3

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا
verses.text: Behold, this is your recompense and your endeavour has been appreciated. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا
verses.text: (O Prophet), indeed We have revealed the Qur'an to you in portions. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
verses.text: So persevere with the command of your Lord 1 and do not pay any heed to the wicked and the unbelieving, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
verses.text: and remember the name of your Lord, morning and evening;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا
verses.text: and prostrate yourself before Him at night, and extol His Glory during the long watches of the night. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
verses.text: Verily they love (the good of this world) that is hastily obtainable and are oblivious of the burdensome Day ahead of them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: نَّحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَشَدَدْنَآ أَسْرَهُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا شِئْنَا بَدَّلْنَآ أَمْثَـٰلَهُمْ تَبْدِيلًا
verses.text: We created them and strengthened their joints; and whenever We wish, We can change their faces entirely. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Verily this is an Exhortation; so let him who so will take a way to his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
verses.text: But your willing shall be of no avail until Allah Himself so wills. 1 Surely Allah is All-Knowing, Most Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
verses.text: He admits to His Mercy whomsoever He pleases. As for the wrong-doers, He has prepared for them a grievous chastisement. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمُرْسَلَـٰتِ عُرْفًا
verses.text: By the (winds) sent forth in quick succession,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْعَـٰصِفَـٰتِ عَصْفًا
verses.text: which then blow tempestuously

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٰتِ نَشْرًا
verses.text: and raise (clouds) and scatter them around,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْفَـٰرِقَـٰتِ فَرْقًا
verses.text: then winnow them thoroughly,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: and then cast (Allah's) remembrance (in people's hearts),

verses.arabicUthmani: عُذْرًا أَوْ نُذْرًا
verses.text: to serve as an excuse or a warning. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: Surely what you are promised 1 shall come to pass. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ طُمِسَتْ
verses.text: So when the stars are extinguished, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ فُرِجَتْ
verses.text: and the sky is rent asunder, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ نُسِفَتْ
verses.text: and the mountains are blown away,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلرُّسُلُ أُقِّتَتْ
verses.text: and the appointed time to bring the Messengers together arrives,(then shall the promised event come to pass). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ
verses.text: To which Day has this task been deferred?

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَوْمِ ٱلْفَصْلِ
verses.text: To the Day of Judgement.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ
verses.text: What do you know what the Day of Judgement is?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نُهْلِكِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Did We not destroy many a nation of the earlier times? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We shall cause those of later times 1 to follow them.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Thus do We deal with the guilty.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.text: Did We not create you of a mean fluid,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ
verses.text: which We then placed in a secure repository 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ قَدَرٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: until an appointed time? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَـٰدِرُونَ
verses.text: See that We had the power to do so. Great indeed is Our power to do what We will. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا
verses.text: Did We not make the earth a receptacle,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَحْيَآءً وَأَمْوَٰتًا
verses.text: for the living and the dead,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا
verses.text: and did We not firmly fix towering mountains on it and give you sweet water to drink? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Proceed 1 now towards that which you were wont to deny as false;

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ
verses.text: proceed towards the three-pronged shadow, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
verses.text: which neither provides (cooling) shade nor protection against the flames;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍ كَٱلْقَصْرِ
verses.text: it indeed throws up sparks like castles,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَـٰلَتٌ صُفْرٌ
verses.text: which seem as though they are yellow-coloured camels. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth!

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: That will be the Day on which they will not (be able to) utter a word,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ
verses.text: nor will they be allowed to proffer excuses. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth!

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ۖ جَمَعْنَـٰكُمْ وَٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: That is the Day of Judgement on which We have assembled you as well as all those who went before you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌ فَكِيدُونِ
verses.text: So if you have any ploy, try it against Me! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: Behold, today the God-fearing 1 will be amidst shades and springs,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: and the fruits that they desire (will be ready at hand).

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Eat and drink and may every joy attend you as a reward for your deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Thus do We reward those that do good.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: Eat 1 and enjoy yourselves for a while. 2 Surely you are evil-doers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ
verses.text: When it is said to them: “Bow down (before Allah),” they do not bow down. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe on that Day to those that give the lie to the Truth!

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: In what discourse after this (Qur'an) will they, then, believe? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: About what are they asking one another?

verses.arabicUthmani: عَنِ ٱلنَّبَإِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Is it about the awesome tiding

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: that they are in utter disagreement? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: No indeed; 1 soon will they come to know; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: again, no indeed; soon will they come to know.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَـٰدًا
verses.text: Have We not spread the earth like a bed, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَوْتَادًا
verses.text: and fixed the mountains like pegs, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا
verses.text: and created you in pairs (as men and women), 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا
verses.text: and made your sleep a means of repose, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا
verses.text: and made the night a covering,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا
verses.text: and made the day to seek livelihood, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا
verses.text: and built above you seven strong firmaments, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا
verses.text: and placed therein a hot, shining lamp, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا
verses.text: and sent down abundant water from the clouds

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا
verses.text: so that We may thereby bring forth grain and vegetation,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا
verses.text: and gardens dense with foliage? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ كَانَ مِيقَـٰتًا
verses.text: Surely the Day of Judgement has an appointed time;

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.text: the Day when the Trumpet shall be blown, and you will come forth in multitudes; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًا
verses.text: and when the sky shall be opened up and will become all doors;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا
verses.text: and the mountains will be set in motion and become a mirage. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
verses.text: Surely the Hell is an ambush, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًا
verses.text: a resort for the rebellious;

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا
verses.text: therein they shall abide for ages, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا
verses.text: they shall taste in it no coolness, nor any pleasant drink

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا
verses.text: save boiling water and wash of the wounds; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءً وِفَاقًا
verses.text: a befitting recompense for their deeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا
verses.text: For indeed they did not look forward to any reckoning,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا
verses.text: and roundly denied Our Signs as false. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا
verses.text: And everything have We recorded in a Book. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ فَلَن نَّزِيدَكُمْ إِلَّا عَذَابًا
verses.text: So taste (the fruit of your deeds). We shall only increase your torment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا
verses.text: Surely the state of triumph awaits the God-fearing: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: حَدَآئِقَ وَأَعْنَـٰبًا
verses.text: gardens and vineyards,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَوَاعِبَ أَتْرَابًا
verses.text: and youthful maidens of like age, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَأْسًا دِهَاقًا
verses.text: and an overflowing cup.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا
verses.text: Therein they shall hear no idle talk, nor any falsehood; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا
verses.text: a recompense from your Lord and an ample reward 1

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
verses.text: from the Lord of the heavens and the earth and of that which is between them; the Most Merciful Lord before Whom none dare utter a word. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا
verses.text: The Day when the Spirit 1 and the angels are ranged row on row. None shall speak save he whom the Merciful Lord will permit; and he too will speak what is right. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
verses.text: That Day is sure to come. So let him who will seek a resort with his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنذَرْنَـٰكُمْ عَذَابًا قَرِيبًا يَوْمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلْمَرْءُ مَا قَدَّمَتْ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلْكَافِرُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى كُنتُ تُرَٰبًۢا
verses.text: Lo! We warn you of a chastisement near at hand; 1 the Day when a man will look on what his own hands have sent forth, and the unbelievers shall say: “Oh would that I were utter dust.” 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا
verses.text: By those (angels) that pluck out the soul from depths,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا
verses.text: and gently take it away;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا
verses.text: and by those that speedily glide along (the cosmos),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا
verses.text: and vie with the others(in carrying out their Lord's behests);

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.text: and then manage the affairs of the Universe(according to their Lord's commands). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرْجُفُ ٱلرَّاجِفَةُ
verses.text: The Day when the quaking will cause a violent convulsion,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ
verses.text: and will be followed by another quaking. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ
verses.text: On that Day some hearts shall tremble (with fright), 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَبْصَـٰرُهَا خَـٰشِعَةٌ
verses.text: and their eyes shall be downcast with dread.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ
verses.text: They say: “Shall we indeed be restored to life,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً
verses.text: even after we have been reduced to bones, hollow and rotten?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ
verses.text: They say: “That will then be a return with a great loss!” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.text: Surely they will need no more than a single stern blast,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ
verses.text: and lo, they will all be in the open plain. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
verses.text: Has 1 Moses' story reached you?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
verses.text: When his Lord called him in the sacred valley of Tuwa, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.text: and directed him: “Go to Pharaoh, he has rebelled,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: and say to him: 'Are you willing to be purified,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: that I may direct you to your Lord and then you hold Him 1 in awe?' ”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْـَٔايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: Then Moses (went to Pharaoh and) showed him the Great Sign; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبَ وَعَصَىٰ
verses.text: but he denied it as false and disobeyed,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: and then he turned back to have recourse to his craftiness, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ
verses.text: and gathered his people and declared: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: “I am the supreme lord of you all.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذَهُ ٱللَّهُ نَكَالَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ وَٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.text: Thereupon Allah seized him for the chastisement of the World to Come as well as of the present.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
verses.text: Surely there is a great lesson in it for whoever would fear (Allah). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
verses.text: Is 1 it harder to create you or the heaven? 2 But Allah built it,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and raised its vault high and proportioned it;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: and covered its night with darkness and brought forth from it its day; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ
verses.text: and thereafter spread out the earth, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا
verses.text: and brought out of it its water and its pasture, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا
verses.text: and firmly fixed in it mountains;

verses.arabicUthmani: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.text: all this as provision for you and your cattle. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: But when the great calamity will come about 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: on the Day when man will recall all his strivings, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
verses.text: and Hell will be brought in sight for anyone to see:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَن طَغَىٰ
verses.text: then he who transgressed

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: and preferred the life of this world,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.text: most surely his abode shall be Hell.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
verses.text: But he who feared to stand before his Lord, and restrained himself from evil desires,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
verses.text: most surely his abode shall be Paradise. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا
verses.text: They ask you about the Hour: “When will it be?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ
verses.text: What concern do you have to speak about that?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ
verses.text: Its knowledge rests with your Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا
verses.text: You are only a warner to him who has a fear of it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: On the Day they see it, they will feel as though they had stayed (in the grave) no more than one evening or one morning. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: He frowned and turned away

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ
verses.text: that the blind man came to him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ
verses.text: How could you know? Perhaps he would cleanse himself,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: or he might be mindful and good counsel might avail him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: Now he who waxes indifferent,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنتَ لَهُۥ تَصَدَّىٰ
verses.text: you attend to him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا عَلَيْكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ
verses.text: though you are not to blame if he would not cleanse himself.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: But he who comes to you running,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: and fears (Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنتَ عَنْهُ تَلَهَّىٰ
verses.text: you pay no heed to him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ
verses.text: No indeed; 1 this is only a Reminder. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So whoso wills may give heed to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍ
verses.text: It is contained in scrolls highly honoured,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّرْفُوعَةٍ مُّطَهَّرَةٍۭ
verses.text: most exalted and purified, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍ
verses.text: borne by the hands of scribes,

verses.arabicUthmani: كِرَامٍۭ بَرَرَةٍ
verses.text: noble 1 and purified. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Accursed 1 be man! 2 How stubbornly he denies the Truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ
verses.text: Out of what did Allah create him?

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ
verses.text: Out of a sperm-drop 1 did He create him and then determined a measure for him, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ
verses.text: and then made the course of life easy for him, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ
verses.text: then He caused him to die and brought him to the grave, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِذَا شَآءَ أَنشَرَهُۥ
verses.text: and then, whenever He wishes, He will raise him back to life. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ
verses.text: Nay, but man did not fulfil what Allah had enjoined upon him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ
verses.text: So let man just consider his food: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّا
verses.text: We poured water, pouring it in great abundance, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّا
verses.text: and cleaved the earth, cleaving it asunder; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّا
verses.text: then caused the grain to grow out of it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِنَبًا وَقَضْبًا
verses.text: together with grapes and vegetables,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزَيْتُونًا وَنَخْلًا
verses.text: and olives and palms,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًا
verses.text: and dense orchards,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةً وَأَبًّا
verses.text: and fruits and pastures –

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ
verses.text: all this as a provision for you and your cattle. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ
verses.text: But when the deafening cry shall be sounded 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَفِرُّ ٱلْمَرْءُ مِنْ أَخِيهِ
verses.text: on the Day when each man shall flee from his brother,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمِّهِۦ وَأَبِيهِ
verses.text: and his mother and his father;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَبَنِيهِ
verses.text: and his consort and his children; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ
verses.text: on that Day each will be occupied with his own business, making him oblivious of all save himself. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُّسْفِرَةٌ
verses.text: Some faces on that Day shall be beaming with happiness,

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌ
verses.text: and be cheerful and joyous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ
verses.text: Some faces on that Day shall be dust-ridden,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ
verses.text: enveloped by darkness.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَفَرَةُ ٱلْفَجَرَةُ
verses.text: These will be the unbelievers, the wicked.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ
verses.text: When the sun shall be folded up, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّجُومُ ٱنكَدَرَتْ
verses.text: when the stars shall scatter away, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجِبَالُ سُيِّرَتْ
verses.text: when the mountains shall be set in motion, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْعِشَارُ عُطِّلَتْ
verses.text: when the ten-months pregnant camels shall be abandoned, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْوُحُوشُ حُشِرَتْ
verses.text: when the savage beasts shall be brought together, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ سُجِّرَتْ
verses.text: when the seas shall be set boiling, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلنُّفُوسُ زُوِّجَتْ
verses.text: when 1 the souls shall be rejoined (with their bodies), 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْمَوْءُۥدَةُ سُئِلَتْ
verses.text: and when the girl-child buried alive shall be asked:

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَىِّ ذَنۢبٍ قُتِلَتْ
verses.text: for what offence was she killed? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلصُّحُفُ نُشِرَتْ
verses.text: and when the scrolls of (men's) deeds shall be unfolded,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ كُشِطَتْ
verses.text: and when Heaven is laid bare; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ
verses.text: and Hell is stoked,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ
verses.text: and Paradise brought nigh: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ
verses.text: then shall each person know what he has brought along.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ
verses.text: No indeed; 1 I swear by the alternating stars

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ
verses.text: that hide,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ
verses.text: and by the night as it recedes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ
verses.text: and the morn as it breathes. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: Verily this is the word of a noble message-bearer; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ
verses.text: one mighty 1 and held in honour with the Lord of the Throne;

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ
verses.text: there he is obeyed 1 and held trustworthy. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: (O people of Makkah), your companion 1 is not mad;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: he indeed saw the message-bearer on the clear horizon; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ
verses.text: nor does he grudge (conveying this knowledge about) the Unseen; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
verses.text: nor is it a word of an accursed Satan. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَيْنَ تَذْهَبُونَ
verses.text: Where to are you then heading?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is nothing but Good Counsel for everyone in the world,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ
verses.text: for everyone of you who wishes to follow the Straight Way; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: but your wishing will not avail unless Allah, the Lord of the Universe, so wishes. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ
verses.text: When the heaven is split asunder, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْكَوَاكِبُ ٱنتَثَرَتْ
verses.text: when the stars are scattered,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْبِحَارُ فُجِّرَتْ
verses.text: when the seas are made to burst forth,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْقُبُورُ بُعْثِرَتْ
verses.text: and when graves are laid open, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ
verses.text: everyone shall know all his deeds, both the earlier and the later. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
verses.text: O man! What has deceived you about your generous Lord

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ
verses.text: Who created you, shaped you, and made you well-proportioned,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
verses.text: and set you in whatever form He pleased? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: No indeed; 1 (the fact is that) you deny the Reckoning, 2 declaring it a lie;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.text: you do so the while there are watchers over you;

verses.arabicUthmani: كِرَامًا كَـٰتِبِينَ
verses.text: noble scribes,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَعْلَمُونَ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: who know what you do. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Surely the virtuous shall be in Bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ
verses.text: and the wicked shall be in the Blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَصْلَوْنَهَا يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: They shall enter it on the Day of Recompense

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ
verses.text: and then shall never come out of it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: What do you know what the Day of Recompense is?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Again, what do you know what the Day of Recompense is?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
verses.text: It is the Day when no one shall have the power to do anything for another, 1 and all command shall be Allah's.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ
verses.text: Woe to the stinters; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
verses.text: those who, when they take from others by measure, take their full share; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ
verses.text: but who, when they measure or weigh for others, give less than their due.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: Do they not realise that they will be raised to life

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: on a Great Day, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: a Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the Universe?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ
verses.text: No indeed! 1 Verily the deeds of the wicked are in the Record locked up in the prison-house! 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ
verses.text: And how would you know what the Record of the prison-house is?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.text: It is a Book inscribed.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: Woe, then, to those that give the lie,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُكَذِّبُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: those that give the lie to the Day of Recompense.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: Yet none gives the lie to it except the transgressor immersed in sin;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: who, when Our verses are recited to him, 1 says: “Mere tales of olden times!”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: No indeed! The truth is that their hearts have become rusted on account of their evil deeds. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
verses.text: No indeed! On that Day they will be screened off from seeing their Lord, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: and then they shall enter Hell,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: whereafter they will be told: “This is what you used to give the lie to.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ
verses.text: No indeed! 1 Verily, the deeds of the virtuous shall be in the record of the exalted ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ
verses.text: And what do you know what the Record of the exalted ones is?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ
verses.text: It is a Book inscribed,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: which the angels placed near Allah to safeguard.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Verily the virtuous shall be in Bliss;

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: resting on couches, looking around.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: You shall see upon their faces the glow of bliss.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ
verses.text: They will be served a drink of the finest sealed wine, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ
verses.text: whose seal is musk – so let all aspirants aspire after that –

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ
verses.text: a wine whose mixture is Tasnim, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: a fountain at which the chosen ones shall drink.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: Behold, the wicked were wont to laugh at the believers:

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِهِمْ يَتَغَامَزُونَ
verses.text: when they passed by them they winked,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱنقَلَبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمُ ٱنقَلَبُوا۟ فَكِهِينَ
verses.text: and when they went back to their families, they went back jesting, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: and when they saw the believers, they said: “Lo! These are the erring ones”; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ
verses.text: (they said so although) they had not been appointed watchers over them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
verses.text: But today the believers are laughing at the unbelievers;

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: seated upon their couches, they are looking around.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: Have the unbelievers been duly rewarded for their deeds? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنشَقَّتْ
verses.text: When the sky is rent asunder

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.text: and hearkens to the command 1 of its Lord, doing what it should;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ٱلْأَرْضُ مُدَّتْ
verses.text: and when the earth is stretched out 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ
verses.text: and casts out what is within it and is emptied, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
verses.text: and hearkens to the command of its Lord, doing what it should. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
verses.text: O man, you are striving unto your Lord 1 and you will meet Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ
verses.text: Whoever is given the Record in his right hand

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَوْفَ يُحَاسَبُ حِسَابًا يَسِيرًا
verses.text: shall be called to an easy accounting, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.text: and shall return to his people joyfully. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
verses.text: But he who is given the Record behind his back, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا
verses.text: shall cry for “perdition,”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا
verses.text: and will enter the Blazing Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا
verses.text: He used to live joyfully among his people, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
verses.text: thinking he would never revert (to Us).

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
verses.text: But no; (how would he not revert)? His Lord was ever watching him. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ
verses.text: Nay; I swear by the twilight;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ
verses.text: and by the night and what it enfolds,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ
verses.text: and by the moon, when it reaches its fullness:

verses.arabicUthmani: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍ
verses.text: you shall proceed onwards from stage to stage. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: So, what is the matter with them that they do not believe,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
verses.text: and when the Qur'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate 1 themselves?

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Instead, the unbelievers reject it, calling it a lie.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
verses.text: Allah knows best what they are accumulating (in their Record). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبَشِّرْهُم بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: So give them the good news of a painful chastisement,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
verses.text: except for those who believe and do good deeds. Theirs shall be an unending reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ
verses.text: By the heaven with its impregnable castles; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْمَوْعُودِ
verses.text: by the Promised Day, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ
verses.text: and by the witness and what is witnessed: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْأُخْدُودِ
verses.text: the people of the pit were destroyed

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ
verses.text: with fire abounding in fuel,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ
verses.text: while they sat around it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَفْعَلُونَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ شُهُودٌ
verses.text: and were witnessing what they did to the believers. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
verses.text: Against these they had no grudge except that they believed in Allah, the Most Mighty, the Most Praiseworthy,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: to Whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Allah witnesses everything. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ فَتَنُوا۟ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَتُوبُوا۟ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابُ ٱلْحَرِيقِ
verses.text: Surely those who tormented the believing men and the believing women and then did not repent, theirs shall be the chastisement of Hell, and theirs shall be the chastisement of burning. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
verses.text: As for those who believed and acted righteously, theirs shall be Gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.text: Stern indeed is your Lord's punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ
verses.text: He it is Who creates for the first time and He it is Who will create again,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ
verses.text: and He is the Ever Forgiving, the Most Loving

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ
verses.text: – the Lord of the Glorious Throne,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَّالٌ لِّمَا يُرِيدُ
verses.text: the Executor of what He wills. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْجُنُودِ
verses.text: Has the story of the armies reached you,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِرْعَوْنَ وَثَمُودَ
verses.text: the armies of Pharaoh and Thamud? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ
verses.text: The unbelievers are indeed engaged in denying it, calling it a lie,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ
verses.text: although Allah surrounds them.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌ مَّجِيدٌ
verses.text: Nay; but this is a glorious Qur'an,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى لَوْحٍ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ
verses.text: inscribed on a well-guarded Tablet. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ
verses.text: By the heaven, and the night-visitor,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ
verses.text: what do you know what the night-visitor is?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلنَّجْمُ ٱلثَّاقِبُ
verses.text: It is the piercing star.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ
verses.text: There is no living being but there is a protector over it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ
verses.text: So let man consider of what he was created. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍ
verses.text: He was created of a gushing fluid,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ
verses.text: emanating from between the loins and the ribs. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ
verses.text: Surely He (the Creator) has the power to bring him back (to life). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تُبْلَى ٱلسَّرَآئِرُ
verses.text: On the Day when man's deepest secrets shall be put to the test 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ
verses.text: he shall have no power, and no helper.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ
verses.text: By the heaven with its recurring cycle of rain, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ
verses.text: and by the earth ever bursting with verdure,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌ فَصْلٌ
verses.text: this (Qur'an) is surely a decisive Word,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِٱلْهَزْلِ
verses.text: not a flippant jest. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا
verses.text: They are devising a guile, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَكِيدُ كَيْدًا
verses.text: and I too am devising a guile. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ أَمْهِلْهُمْ رُوَيْدًۢا
verses.text: So leave the unbelievers to themselves; respite them awhile. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى
verses.text: Glorify the name of your Lord, the Most High, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ
verses.text: Who created all things and fashioned them in good proportion; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
verses.text: Who determined 1 and guided them, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ
verses.text: Who brought forth the pasture, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ
verses.text: and then made it into a blackish straw. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ
verses.text: We shall make you recite and then you will not forget, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
verses.text: except what Allah should wish. 1 He knows all that is manifest and all that is hidden. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: We shall ease you to follow the way of Ease.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.text: So render good counsel if good counsel will avail. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: He who fears (Allah) shall heed it, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.text: but the wretched will turn away from it.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
verses.text: He will be cast into the Great Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
verses.text: Then he will neither die in it, nor live. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: He who purified himself shall prosper, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
verses.text: remembering his Lord's name 1 and praying. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: No; but you prefer the present life, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: whereas the Hereafter is better and more enduring. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَفِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: This, indeed, was in the ancient Scrolls,

verses.arabicUthmani: صُحُفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: the Scrolls of Abraham and Moses. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ
verses.text: Has the news of the overwhelming event reached you? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَـٰشِعَةٌ
verses.text: Some faces 1 that Day shall be downcast with fear,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَامِلَةٌ نَّاصِبَةٌ
verses.text: be toiling and worn-out;

verses.arabicUthmani: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً
verses.text: they shall burn in a Scorching Fire;

verses.arabicUthmani: تُسْقَىٰ مِنْ عَيْنٍ ءَانِيَةٍ
verses.text: their drink shall be from a boiling spring.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ
verses.text: They shall have no food except bitter dry thorns 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ
verses.text: that will neither nourish nor satisfy their hunger.

verses.arabicUthmani: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌ
verses.text: On that very Day some faces shall be radiant with joy,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّسَعْيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌ
verses.text: well-pleased with their striving. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
verses.text: They will be in a lofty Garden

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا لَـٰغِيَةً
verses.text: wherein they shall hear no vain talk. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا عَيْنٌ جَارِيَةٌ
verses.text: In it there shall be a flowing spring,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا سُرُرٌ مَّرْفُوعَةٌ
verses.text: and couches raised high,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَكْوَابٌ مَّوْضُوعَةٌ
verses.text: and goblets laid out, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَمَارِقُ مَصْفُوفَةٌ
verses.text: and cushions arrayed in rows,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزَرَابِىُّ مَبْثُوثَةٌ
verses.text: and rich carpets levelled out.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ
verses.text: Do (these unbelievers) not observe the camels: how they were created?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ
verses.text: And the sky: how it was raised high?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ كَيْفَ نُصِبَتْ
verses.text: And the mountains: how they were fixed?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَيْفَ سُطِحَتْ
verses.text: And the earth: how it was spread out? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ
verses.text: So render good counsel, for you are simply required to counsel,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّسْتَ عَلَيْهِم بِمُصَيْطِرٍ
verses.text: and are not invested with the authority to compel them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
verses.text: But whoever will turn away (from the Truth),

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَكْبَرَ
verses.text: Allah will chastise him with the most terrible chastisement.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَآ إِيَابَهُمْ
verses.text: Surely to Us is their return;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا حِسَابَهُم
verses.text: and then it is for Us to call them to account.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْفَجْرِ
verses.text: By the dawn,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ
verses.text: and the ten nights,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ
verses.text: and the even and the odd,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَسْرِ
verses.text: and by the night when it departs.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
verses.text: Is there in this an oath for one endowed with understanding? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
verses.text: Have you 1 not seen how your Lord dealt with Ad

verses.arabicUthmani: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ
verses.text: of Iram, 1 known for their lofty columns,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.text: the like of whom no nation was ever created in the lands of the world? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُوا۟ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ
verses.text: And how did He deal with Thamud who hewed out rocks in the valley? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِرْعَوْنَ ذِى ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.text: And with Pharaoh of the tent pegs 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
verses.text: who transgressed in the countries of the world

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَكْثَرُوا۟ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ
verses.text: spreading in them much corruption?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّكَ سَوْطَ عَذَابٍ
verses.text: Then their Lord unloosed upon them the lash of chastisement.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ
verses.text: Truly your Lord is ever watchful. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
verses.text: As for man, 1 when his Lord tests him by exalting him and bestowing His bounties upon him, he says: “My Lord has exalted me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
verses.text: But when He tests him by straitening his sustenance, he says: “My Lord has humiliated me.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.text: But no; 1 you do not treat the orphan honourably, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: and do not urge one another to feed the poor, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلًا لَّمًّا
verses.text: and greedily devour the entire inheritance, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا
verses.text: and love the riches, loving them ardently. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
verses.text: But no; 1 when the earth is ground to powder,
