verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا
verses.text: and when your Lord appears 1 with rows upon rows of angels,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
verses.text: and when Hell is brought near that Day. On that Day will man understand, but of what avail will that understanding be? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى
verses.text: He will say: “Would that I had sent ahead what would be of avail for this life of mine!”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُعَذِّبُ عَذَابَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Then on that Day Allah will chastise as none other can chastise;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: and Allah will bind as none other can bind.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ
verses.text: (On the other hand it will be said): “O serene soul! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
verses.text: Return to your Lord 1 well-pleased (with your blissful destination), well-pleasing (to your Lord).

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى
verses.text: So enter among My (righteous) servants

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى
verses.text: and enter My Paradise.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.text: Nay! 1 I swear by this city 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتَ حِلٌّۢ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ
verses.text: – this city wherein you have been rendered violable– 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ
verses.text: and I swear by the parent and his offspring: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِى كَبَدٍ
verses.text: Verily We have created man into toil and hardship. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Does he think that no one can overpower him? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ أَهْلَكْتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًا
verses.text: He says: “I have squandered enormous wealth.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Does he believe that none has seen him? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عَيْنَيْنِ
verses.text: Did We not grant him two eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِسَانًا وَشَفَتَيْنِ
verses.text: and a tongue and two lips? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلنَّجْدَيْنِ
verses.text: And did We not show him the two highroads (of good and evil)? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ
verses.text: But he did not venture to scale the difficult steep. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ
verses.text: And what do you know what that difficult steep is?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكُّ رَقَبَةٍ
verses.text: It is freeing someone's neck from slavery;

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ
verses.text: or giving food on a day of hunger

verses.arabicUthmani: يَتِيمًا ذَا مَقْرَبَةٍ
verses.text: to an orphan near of kin;

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ مِسْكِينًا ذَا مَتْرَبَةٍ
verses.text: or to a destitute lying in dust; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
verses.text: and, then besides this, he be one of those who believed, 1 and enjoined upon one another steadfastness and enjoined upon one another compassion. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
verses.text: These are the People of the Right Hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
verses.text: As for those who rejected Our Signs, they are the People of the Left Hand. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ
verses.text: Upon them shall be a Fire that will hem them in. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّمْسِ وَضُحَىٰهَا
verses.text: By the sun and its heat and brightness, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the moon as it follows it;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا جَلَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the day as it displays the sun's glory,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the night as it envelopes the sun; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the sky and by Him Who made it; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the earth and by Him Who stretched it out;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and by the soul and by Him Who perfectly proportioned it, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَىٰهَا
verses.text: and imbued it with (the consciousness of) its evil and its piety: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا
verses.text: He who purifies it will prosper,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا
verses.text: and he who suppresses it will be ruined. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِطَغْوَىٰهَآ
verses.text: In their presumptuous insolence the Thamud 1 called the Truth a lie 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشْقَىٰهَا
verses.text: when their arch-criminal rose up in rage.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ لَهُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ نَاقَةَ ٱللَّهِ وَسُقْيَـٰهَا
verses.text: Then Allah's Messenger warned them: “Hands off the she-camel and her drink!” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
verses.text: But they rejected his statement as a lie and hamstrung the she-camel. 1 For that crime their Lord rumbled down upon them, utterly razing them to the ground.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقْبَـٰهَا
verses.text: He has no fear of its sequel. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.text: By the night when it enshrouds,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّهَارِ إِذَا تَجَلَّىٰ
verses.text: and by the day when it breaks in its glory,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ
verses.text: and by Him Who created the male and the female:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ سَعْيَكُمْ لَشَتَّىٰ
verses.text: surely your strivings are divergent. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
verses.text: As for him who gave out his wealth (for Allah's sake) and abstained (from disobeying Him),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.text: and affirmed the Truth of goodness: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: We shall facilitate for him the Way to Bliss. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسْتَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: As for him who was a miser and behaved with aversion (to Allah),

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.text: and denied the Truth of goodness: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْعُسْرَىٰ
verses.text: We shall facilitate for him the way to Hardship, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ
verses.text: and his wealth shall be of no avail to him when he perishes. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ
verses.text: Surely it is for Us to show the Right Way, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: and to Us belong the Next Life and the present. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنذَرْتُكُمْ نَارًا تَلَظَّىٰ
verses.text: I have now warned you of a Blazing Fire,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَصْلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْأَشْقَى
verses.text: where none shall burn except the most wicked,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: who rejected the Truth, calling it falsehood and turned his back on it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَتْقَى
verses.text: But the God-fearing shall be kept away from it,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يُؤْتِى مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: the Godfearing who spends his wealth to purify himself; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ
verses.text: not as payment for any favours that he received,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: but only to seek the good pleasure of his Lord Most High. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَىٰ
verses.text: He will surely be well-pleased (with him). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلضُّحَىٰ
verses.text: By the bright forenoon, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا سَجَىٰ
verses.text: and by the night when it covers the world with peace: 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
verses.text: (O Prophet), your Lord has neither forsaken you, nor is He displeased. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: Indeed what is to come will be better for you than what has gone by. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: Verily your Lord will soon give you so amply that you will be well-pleased. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَجِدْكَ يَتِيمًا فَـَٔاوَىٰ
verses.text: Did He not find you an orphan and then gave you shelter? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ
verses.text: Did He not find you unaware of the Right Way, and then directed you to it? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
verses.text: And did He not find you in want, and then enriched you? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ
verses.text: Therefore, be not harsh with the orphan; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنْهَرْ
verses.text: and chide not him who asks, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ
verses.text: and proclaim the bounty of your Lord. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ نَشْرَحْ لَكَ صَدْرَكَ
verses.text: (O Prophet), Did We not lay open your breast 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ
verses.text: and relieve you of the burden

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ
verses.text: that had well-nigh broken your back? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ
verses.text: And did We not exalt your fame? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: Indeed, there is ease with hardship.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: Most certainly, there is ease with hardship. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا فَرَغْتَ فَٱنصَبْ
verses.text: So, whenever you are free, strive in devotion,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
verses.text: and turn to your Lord with longing. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ
verses.text: By the fig and the olive; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطُورِ سِينِينَ
verses.text: and by the Mount Sinai, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ
verses.text: and by this city (of Makkah), a haven of peace:

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
verses.text: surely We created man in the best mould; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَـٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَـٰفِلِينَ
verses.text: then We reverted him to the lowest of the low, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.text: except those who have faith and do righteous deeds. Theirs is a never ending reward. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Who, then, can give the lie to you, (O Prophet), about the Reward and the Punishment? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحْكَمِ ٱلْحَـٰكِمِينَ
verses.text: Is not Allah the Greatest of all sovereigns? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
verses.text: Recite 1 in the name of your Lord 2 Who created, 3

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ
verses.text: created man from a clot of congealed blood. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ
verses.text: Recite: and your Lord is Most Generous,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَ بِٱلْقَلَمِ
verses.text: Who taught by the pen, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ
verses.text: taught man what he did not know. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ
verses.text: Nay, 1 surely man transgresses;

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ
verses.text: for he believes himself to be self-sufficient. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ
verses.text: Surely to your Lord is your return. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ
verses.text: Did you see him who forbids

verses.arabicUthmani: عَبْدًا إِذَا صَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: a servant (of Allah) when he prays? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: Did you consider: what if he is on the Right Way,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ أَمَرَ بِٱلتَّقْوَىٰٓ
verses.text: and enjoins piety?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ
verses.text: Did you consider: what if he gives the lie (to the Truth) and turns away (from it)?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
verses.text: Does he not know that Allah sees everything? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ
verses.text: No indeed; 1 if he does not desist, We shall drag him by the forelock;

verses.arabicUthmani: نَاصِيَةٍ كَـٰذِبَةٍ خَاطِئَةٍ
verses.text: by the lying forelock steeped in sin. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ
verses.text: So let him summon his helpmates; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
verses.text: We too shall summon the guards of Hell. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
verses.text: No, not at all. Never obey him. But prostrate yourself and become nigh (to your Lord). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.text: Behold, We revealed this (Qur'an) on the Night of Power. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.text: And what do you know what the Night of Power is?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
verses.text: The Night of Power is better than a thousand months. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
verses.text: The angels along with the Spirit 1 descend in it by the permission of their Lord 2 with all kinds of decrees.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ
verses.text: All peace is that night until the rise of dawn. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
verses.text: Those who disbelieved 1 – be they from the People of the Book or from those who associated 2 others with Allah in His Divinity – will not desist from unbelief until the Clear Proof should come to them; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
verses.text: a Messenger 1 from Allah, reciting from Purified Scrolls; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ
verses.text: in writings wherein are scriptures, absolutely true and unerring.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
verses.text: Nor did those to whom the Book had been given split up until after the Proof (of the Right Way) had come to them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
verses.text: Yet all that they had been commanded was that they serve Allah, with utter sincerity, devoting themselves exclusively to Him, and that they establish Prayer and pay Zakah. That is the Right Faith. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
verses.text: Those who disbelieved 1 – be they from among the People of the Book or among those who associated others with Allah in His Divinity– shall be in the Fire, and will abide in it. They are the worst of creatures. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
verses.text: But those that believe and work righteous deeds, they are the best of creatures. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ
verses.text: Their recompense lies with their Lord: Gardens of eternity beneath which rivers flow; therein they shall dwell, forever and ever. Allah is well-pleased with them, and they are well-pleased with Him. All this is for him who fears his Lord. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا
verses.text: When the earth will be shaken with a mighty shaking, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا
verses.text: and the earth will throw up all her burdens, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا لَهَا
verses.text: and man will cry out: “What is the matter with her?” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا
verses.text: On that Day it will relate all her news, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
verses.text: for your Lord will have commanded her (to do so).

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
verses.text: On that Day people will go forth in varying states 1 so that they be shown their deeds. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: So, whoever does an atom's weight of good shall see it;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
verses.text: and whoever does an atom's weight of evil shall see it. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْعَـٰدِيَـٰتِ ضَبْحًا
verses.text: By (the horses) that charge snorting, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُورِيَـٰتِ قَدْحًا
verses.text: then raise sparks of fire (by their hoofs), 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُغِيرَٰتِ صُبْحًا
verses.text: then raid by the dawn, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًا
verses.text: and blaze a trail of dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا
verses.text: and penetrate deep into a host.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ
verses.text: Verily man is most ungrateful to his Lord; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌ
verses.text: and he himself is a witness to that, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ
verses.text: and surely he loves riches with a passionate loving. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.text: Is he not aware that when whatever lies (buried) in the graves is overthrown; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُصِّلَ مَا فِى ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: and the secrets of the hearts are laid bare (and examined)? 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
verses.text: Surely on that Day will their Lord be fully informed about them. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: The Calamity! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: What is the Calamity?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ
verses.text: And what do you know what the Calamity is?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَكُونُ ٱلنَّاسُ كَٱلْفَرَاشِ ٱلْمَبْثُوثِ
verses.text: On that Day human beings shall be like scattered moths,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ
verses.text: and the mountains shall be like fluffs of carded wool in varying colours. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.text: Then 1 he whose scales weigh heavier

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.text: shall have a blissful life;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
verses.text: but he whose scales weigh lighter, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأُمُّهُۥ هَاوِيَةٌ
verses.text: his shall be the deep pit for a dwelling. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ
verses.text: And what do you know what that is?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌۢ
verses.text: A Blazing Fire! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ
verses.text: The craving for ever-greater worldly gains and to excel others in that regard keeps you occupied 1

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ
verses.text: until you reach your graves. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Nay, you will soon come to know; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: nay, again, you shall soon come to know.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: Nay, would that you knew with certainty of knowledge (what your attitude will lead to, you would never have acted the way you do).

verses.arabicUthmani: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ
verses.text: You will surely end up seeing Hell;

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: again, you shall most certainly end up seeing it with absolute certainty.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Then, on that Day, you will be called to account for all the bounties you enjoyed. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْعَصْرِ
verses.text: By the time!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَفِى خُسْرٍ
verses.text: Lo! Man is in a state of loss;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
verses.text: save those who have faith and do righteous deeds, and counsel each other to hold on to truth and counsel each other to be steadfast. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ
verses.text: Woe to every fault-finding backbiter; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ
verses.text: who amasses wealth and counts it over and again. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ
verses.text: He thinks that his wealth will immortalise him forever. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ
verses.text: Nay, he shall be thrown 1 into the Crusher. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ
verses.text: And what do you know what the Crusher is?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ
verses.text: It is the Fire 1 kindled by Allah,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ
verses.text: the Fire that shall rise to the hearts (of criminals). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ
verses.text: Verily it will close in upon them, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى عَمَدٍ مُّمَدَّدَةٍۭ
verses.text: in outstretched columns. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
verses.text: Have you not seen 1 how your Lord dealt with the people of the elephants? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ
verses.text: Did He not bring their plan 1 to naught? 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَرْسَلَ عَلَيْهِمْ طَيْرًا أَبَابِيلَ
verses.text: And He sent against them swarms of birds 1

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ
verses.text: which smote them with stones of baked clay, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍ مَّأْكُولٍۭ
verses.text: and made them like straw eaten up (by cattle). 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ
verses.text: Since the Quraysh became accustomed, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِۦلَـٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ
verses.text: accustomed to the journey of winter and summer, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
verses.text: therefore, let them worship the Lord of this House; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ
verses.text: Who fed them against hunger, 1 and secured them against fear. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: Did you see him 1 who gives the lie to the Reward and Punishment 2 of the Hereafter? 3

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ
verses.text: Such is 1 the one who repulses the orphans away, 2

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: and urges 1 not the feeding of the needy. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: Woe, then, to those who pray, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
verses.text: but are heedless in their Prayers, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ
verses.text: those who do good (in order) to be seen, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ
verses.text: and deny people the articles of common necessity. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ
verses.text: (O Prophet), We have surely bestowed upon you good in abundance. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
verses.text: So offer Prayer and sacrifice 1 to your Lord alone.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ ٱلْأَبْتَرُ
verses.text: Verily your enemy 1 alone has been cut off from the roots. 2

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: Say: “O unbelievers!” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: I do not worship those that you worship 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.text: neither do you worship Him Whom I worship; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ
verses.text: nor will I worship those whom you have worshipped;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ
verses.text: nor are you going to worship Him Whom I worship. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ
verses.text: To you is your religion, and to me, my religion. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
verses.text: When the help comes from Allah, and victory (is granted), 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.text: and you see people entering Allah's religion in multitudes, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
verses.text: then extol the praise 1 of your Lord and pray to Him for forgiveness. 2 For He indeed is ever disposed to accept repentance.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ
verses.text: Destroyed were the hands of Abu Lahab, and he lay utterly doomed. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
verses.text: His wealth did not avail him, nor his acquisitions. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ
verses.text: Surely, he will be cast into a Flaming Fire

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلْحَطَبِ
verses.text: along with his wife, 1 that carrier of slanderous tales; 2

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ
verses.text: upon her neck shall be a rope of palm-fibre. 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
verses.text: Say: 1 “He is Allah, 2 the One and Unique; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
verses.text: Allah, Who is in need of none and of Whom all are in need; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ
verses.text: He neither begot any nor was He begotten, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ
verses.text: and none is comparable to Him.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
verses.text: Say: 1 “I seek refuge 2 with the Lord of the rising day; 3

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
verses.text: from the evil of all that He created; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
verses.text: from the evil of night's darkness when it spreads around; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ
verses.text: from the evil of the women who blow on knots; 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
verses.text: and from the evil of the envier when he envies.” 1

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: Say: “I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind;

verses.arabicUthmani: مَلِكِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: the King of mankind,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَـٰهِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: the True God of mankind, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
verses.text: from the mischief of the whispering, elusive prompter who returns again and again, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يُوَسْوِسُ فِى صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: who whispers in the hearts of people;

verses.arabicUthmani: مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
verses.text: whether he be from the jinn or humans.” 1
